Derek,
At this time next week, polls will start closing across New Hampshire and we'll be hours away from knowing how New Hampshire votes this election.
We are so close to victory and we need to [_**seal the deal**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQxNjAxNzExNTQwNDA5ODk4JmM9YTVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDA2MTA1ODMmZD16MGc4eTNs.KuJPrx23kQdNmx4FbUBj411pgSaYYIppy1ZVUJNU-k8) by reaching out to even more voters between now and election day.
[_**Your donation tonight will enable us to increase our digital spending, reaching voters online with our Republican message.**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQxNjAxNzExNTQwNDA5ODk4JmM9YTVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDA2MTA1ODYmZD1nMWM4aDlp.OYncoa9rWaTK78M4Q47eCrbEwu6piuyzpPt_Fsv7XfM)
Republicans in New Hampshire will always stand firm against an Income or Sales Tax. We'll fight to lower taxes on small businesses and expand opportunity for all. We need strong Republican majorities in our State House, Senate, and Executive Council that will work with Governor Chris Sununu, and we need to make sure we have the resources to send a new Republican delegation to Congress from New Hampshire.
We can't achieve any of our goals without your support right now. [_**Please donate to help us deliver our message and win this November 3rd.**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQxNjAxNzExNTQwNDA5ODk4JmM9YTVtOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDA2MTA1ODkmZD1wM3k4cDF4.w5fSPWqrlAP90iOi32qMPlmDTqhvGnjpvgCqIFj42g4)
\- Team NHGOP

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Put Americans first, not China
body:
American leaders from both parties stood down to China for 40 years. The Chinese Communist Party broke the rules on global trade... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fd094d5ed&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 27, 2020
---
| | |
# Put Americans first, not China

**American leaders** from both parties stood down to China for 40 years. The Chinese Communist Party broke the rules on global trade, allowed Chinese firms to steal technology from American companies, and in turn destroyed entire sectors of our economy.

**The corporate class** and its chosen “experts,” for their part, turned a blind eye to China’s [**human rights abuses**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6db42c4c85&e=3ee4985eea) and crackdowns on speech. Washington politicians fell in line: Just open America’s markets to China, they said, and the CCP will change its ways and become a responsible global citizen as it grows richer and stronger.

**They were wrong.** Under President Trump, America is fighting back.

**Earlier this year,** as the Coronavirus spread from China throughout the world, President Trump acted quickly. He restricted travel from China and launched a White House Coronavirus Task Force in January. At the time, Democrat leaders and liberal pundits called President Trump’s strong response to the virus “xenophobic.”

**The World Health Organization** continued to stand by Beijing’s side. A little over 2 weeks before President Trump’s actions, the WHO irresponsibly parroted the CCP’s claim that the Coronavirus could not be transmitted between humans.

**In reality, **if China had acted on the virus just _three weeks_ sooner than it did, up to [**95% of global cases**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ac89432b5&e=3ee4985eea) from COVID-19 could have been prevented, according to a study from the University of Southampton in England.

**Instead, more than 43 million** cases have infected the world so far—and counting.

**The WHO nevertheless** claimed that the CCP had set a “new standard for outbreak control.” Meanwhile, WHO Director-General Dr. Tedros inexplicably condemned President Trump’s travel ban while _ praising _the domestic travel restrictions put in place by China.

**To make matters worse,** U.S. taxpayers sent the WHO millions of dollars each year only to see its leaders protect Chinese officials instead of American citizens. [**President Trump withdrew funding**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=397897e494&e=3ee4985eea), telling the WHO to investigate its alarming failures.

**Democrats in Congress** took the WHO’s side. Speaker Nancy Pelosi called efforts to withhold its funding pending an investigation “stupid.” Throughout the pandemic, the left has remained conspicuously silent about both the CCP’s culpability and the WHO’s failures. Democrats in Washington prefer to use the virus as a political weapon, calling for more lockdowns and other policies that hurt American workers.

**Endless lockdowns** may be an easy choice for affluent pundits and professionals who can work from home and afford to hire tutors for their kids, but they carry an [**enormous cost for most Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a993fde2a2&e=3ee4985eea). In addition to jobs lost and schools closed, there are increased risks of suicides, depression, opioid and drug abuse, domestic violence cases, and delays in important preventative medical care.

**President Trump** wants to see our country safely reopen by continuing measures to protect our most vulnerable citizens, including seniors. By prioritizing these groups, we can return more people safely to work and get more of our children back in school.

**In other words,** President Trump’s Coronavirus strategy reflects his governing agenda from day one: Don’t punish American citizens for the mistakes and failures of other countries and global organizations. Hold the real offenders accountable.

📖 [**MUST-READ: How China Threatens American Democracy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5305e21959&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---

To make matters worse, U.S. taxpayers sent the WHO millions of dollars each year only to see its leaders protect Chinese officials instead of American citizens. , telling the WHO to investigate its alarming failures. Democrats in Congress took the WHO’s side. Speaker Nancy Pelosi called efforts to withhold its funding pending an investigation “stupid.” Throughout the pandemic, the left has remained conspicuously silent about both the CCP’s culpability and the WHO’s failures. Democrats in Washington prefer to use the virus as a political weapon, calling for more lockdowns and other policies that hurt American workers. Endless lockdowns may be an easy choice for affluent pundits and professionals who can work from home and afford to hire tutors for their kids, but they carry an . In addition to jobs lost and schools closed, there are increased risks of suicides, depression, opioid and drug abuse, domestic violence cases, and delays in important preventative medical care. President Trump wants to see our country safely reopen by continuing measures to protect our most vulnerable citizens, including seniors. By prioritizing these groups, we can return more people safely to work and get more of our children back in school. In other words, President Trump’s Coronavirus strategy reflects his governing agenda from day one: Don’t punish American citizens for the mistakes and failures of other countries and global organizations. Hold the real offenders accountable. 📖 | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, Justice Amy Coney Barrett, Jesse Barrett, and Justice Clarence Thomas | October 26, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Arizonans shouldn't fear their utility bill or worry about the next unfair utility rate increase every time they open the mail. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/917b7cdfd103/jim-oconnor-for-corporation-commission-vote-now-3562930?e=66a0c3ba26)

| |
# VOTE JIM O'CONNOR FOR ARIZONA CORPORATION COMMISSION
_I'll work __tirelessly to save you money!_
**_As your next Corporation Commissioner, I will work everyday to protect you from unfair utility rate increases and costly, unnecessary government red tape._**

The difference between me and the radical leftists running for this position is that, unlike them, I don't answer to anyone other than YOU, the voter.

_Those guys are beholden to out of state special interests who are pouring millions upon millions into attacking me and the common sense Republican team._

[**I'm running to give everyday, hardworking Arizonans a voice at the Corporation Commission and to fight for you.**](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=4211920049&e=66a0c3ba26) I make you this promise—finding ways to save you money will be a top priority of the Commission if I'm elected.
---
|
---
|
# TURN IN YOUR BALLOT NOW!

Democrats are out-voting Republicans 2-to-1 in some areas of Arizona!

Arizona Republicans, **_if you haven't already turned in your ballot please do it now and cast your vote for me and the rest of the common sense Republican team for Corporation Commission._**

Find out about Republican candidates [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=599ea2c1a1&e=66a0c3ba26).

Find out where to vote [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=881f1b3250&e=66a0c3ba26).

**This election is the most important election of our lifetime.
We need YOUR vote.**

name: Team Hagerty
subject: One Week Until Election Day
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jd/) October 27, 2020 **Justice Amy Coney Barrett Is Confirmed** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last night, the Senate voted to confirm President Donald Trump's nominee, Justice Amy Coney Barrett, to fill the vacant Supreme Court seat. Justice Barrett proved herself highly qualified to serve on the Supreme Court. She is a well-respected jurist - a solid constitutionalist, who will steadfastly serve our nation. Justice Barrett's confirmation is a vital step in protecting our constitutional rights. Should the Democrats retaliate by attempting to pack the court with liberal activist judges, Bill will oppose any effort to make the Supreme Court into a rubber stamp for the Democrats' left-wing agenda.You can read Bill's full statement on the confirmation vote [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-y/) **ICYMI: Join #TeamHagerty This Week** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-j/) This Saturday, October 31, Team Hagerty invites you to join Bill and Representative John Rose in Putnam County for a Kick Off The Vote breakfast. We'll be celebrating the last few days before Election Day with conservatives in TN-6 and hope you'll be able to make it!RSVP for the Kick Off The Vote event with Hagerty and Congressman Rose [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-t/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-i/) Tennessee Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson's 14th annual Boots & Jeans, BBQ & Beans kicks off this Sunday, November 1 at 4:00 p.m. in Franklin. We'll be joined by conservative leaders in our state like Governor Bill Lee, Senator Marsha Blackburn, Lt. Governor Randy McNally and Representative Mark Green. Hope to see you there!Get your tickets for the event [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-d/) **Election Day Is One Week Away** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! It's not just about sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must re-elect President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Leaf-Chronicle:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-o/) Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty visits Kiwanis Club****[WSMV:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-b/) Bill Hagerty And President Trump Speaking****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-m/) U.S. Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty Warns Tennessee That Socialists Have Taken Over the Democratic Party****[Knox Focus:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-c/) Senate candidate Bill Hagerty addresses Republicans at Lincoln Day Dinner**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-e/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jh/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-jk/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-xttulc-l-tl)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-xttulc-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tr) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-xttulc-fuutjhhtj-ty/)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Congrats Amy Coney Barrett!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Let's make sure Amy Coney Barrett knows grassroots conservatives appreciate her dedication and wish her well as she begins her new responsibilities on the Supreme Court. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)
---
Fellow American - _we did it._

Justice Amy Coney Barrett has been successfully confirmed by the Senate and was sworn in tonight to serve on the nation's highest court by Justice Clarence Thomas.

This is a historic achievement, Fellow American. Justice Barrett is a highly deserving, hard-working, principled jurist who has earned this honor. **[I'd like you to join me in congratulating her today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)
Justice Barrett faced a contentious hearing process - opposed by the hyper-partisan Democrats desperate to block her confirmation, but our Republican Senate majority made the difference and overcame their opposition to confirm her nomination.

**[So please join me by offering your own best wishes and congratulations today by signing Team Graham's card for ACB!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)**

Fellow American, let's make sure Amy Coney Barrett knows grassroots conservatives appreciate her dedication and wish her well as she begins her new responsibilities on the Supreme Court. **[Please add your name to show your thanks today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)**

_Thank you for all you do!_

Sincerely,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)

Lindsey Graham

| [**Add Your Name ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707918:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)
---

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707919:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)
**Lindsey Graham is a fighter who doesn't back down from a challenge. He's a conservative who gets things done. He's a leader who puts our country above all!**

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707919:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707920:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW1hP8HKNp).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707921:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707922:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707923:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56707924:W1hP8HKNp:m:1:877327319:514808F4034FCEC2E1BE9D269FD293CD:r)

body:
With less than a week to go, we are on the homestretch. Make an impact today! Volunteer! | | | | [ ](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=afa1432364&e=a39a40cba9)
---
| | | **ONE WEEK TO GO!** Peter, we are on the homestretch of the most consequential election of our lifetime! Our freedoms are on the ballot!

If you're on Facebook, [**PLEASE share this post**](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=c3d7302b59&e=a39a40cba9) I just made about how important it is to volunteer this last week of the election. My goal is to make this video go viral, which can only happen if my supporters react, comment on, save, and most importantly SHARE my post. You can go straight to the link and share from there: **[https://fb.watch/1obU1K6G95/](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=5c0c2d24e7&e=a39a40cba9)** Also, if you haven't personally signed up to volunteer, please join me to call voters **JUST for this last week of the election**!! Even if you can only make calls for **one hour per day** , that will be enough to get a critical mass of voters to the polls:

body:
This critical race needs your attention! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/0e7b3bf2399b29e3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I recently visited New Hampshire, and I can really get behind their “live free or die” spirit! I can also happily get behind Corky Messner for U.S. Senate. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/85ba795505169b6ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Corky is facing a tough race against the incumbent, Jeanne Shaheen. She is a rank-and-file leftist who believes that the government knows better than individuals and families, and she votes accordingly. **Corky is the perfect fit and partner for President Trump, and has even been endorsed by him!** Corky is not a career politician, and he knows what it’s going to take to get America back on track and keep it GREAT. **Will you please chip in what you can right now to help support a true conservative?** [CHIP IN $300 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/b55eef7bf3100f27c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $150 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/99dd7f37ce0cd780c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $50 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/4774ef0e2f4e852bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $25 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/c54fe40f491f2180c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $5 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/fd7163577ddcda5cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Corky is a great ally to President Trump, and we need all the help we can get! Please donate now to make sure Corky is elected, and we can defeat Jeanne Shaheen! -Kristi Noem [DONATE NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/da2d7391003182d8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/f3f7dcf77da97a73c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d53ed68a06544de4/fbe88ba127f87b05c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Daniel Gade
subject: Less than ONE WEEK
body:
These are our final days to close the gap.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699425:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)
---
Peter,
---
**_6 DAYS_**
---
That's all we have left to FIRE Mark Warner and protect our Senate majority.
---
We've already outraised him last quarter.
---
We've already narrowed the polls between us to _single digits._
---
**_We've come so far, I'd hate to lose it all at the final hour._**
---
_But, as it stands, we're still $142,631 behind on our final Election Day Fund._ We can't end this race with any regrets. We need to fight until the very last vote is cast.
---
[**Please make a contribution today to FIRE Mark Warner and replace him with a conservative U.S Army Ranger who will always put Virginians first -- and I'll unlock a 3x-match for the next 20 minutes.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699425:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699425:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)
---

**[CONTRIBUTE $100>> $400](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699428:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250>> $1,000](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699429:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500>> $2,000](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699430:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56699425:sOFyrHKUN:m:1:2202880964:62F2109717417564756696EBE13C03DC:r)**
---
Thank you,
---

**FROM THE TEAM**
Governor Carney and Lieutenant Governor Hall-Long will continue to focus on the dual objectives of a healthy community and a strong economy. It can't be either or. We have to have both.
There are 6 days until Election Day.
Share the below message with your friends and family to make sure we continue to have steady leadership during COVID-19 and beyond.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: One week to go
body:
We have just one week until Election Day and Bill asked us to reach out to make sure he has your support.
Peter,We have just one week until Election Day and Bill asked us to reach out to make sure he has your support.We're finalizing our get-out-the-vote budget for this final week and we're still $8,702 short of our goal.[**Can you chip-in right now and help us win big next week?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiiril-fuutjhhtj-r/)**FUND OUR GET-OUT-THE-VOTE BUDGET** [CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiiril-fuutjhhtj-y/) [CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiiril-fuutjhhtj-j/) [CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiiril-fuutjhhtj-t/) [CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiiril-fuutjhhtj-i/) We have an incredible grassroots team across the state to get Republican voters to the polls. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: PA’s senior Senator Bob Casey, Jr. endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for Auditor General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , U.S. Senator and former Auditor General Bob Casey personifies integrity, responsibility and service and I deeply value his endorsement in which he said, "I have known Nina for years and I have no doubt she will be an independent watchdog for the people. I know she will fight every day in Harrisburg to protect Pennsylvania's most vulnerable citizens. She will ensure the State Government is held accountable to the people it serves". Watch the entire endorsement here: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/dujff3bak_cslzu8WCMkzsEk2cKHqoUeslwrh8dgLjA=?v=NFfvFEuFK40) [Click here to view full video](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/dujff3bak_cslzu8WCMkzsEk2cKHqoUeslwrh8dgLjA=?v=NFfvFEuFK40) To receive the endorsement of the current Auditor General, Eugene DePasquale and the former Auditor General is very significant for our campaign. Like President Obama, VP Joe Biden, Senator Kamala Harris, Mayor Pete Buttigieg, Andrew Yang, State Representative Malcolm Kenyatta, and many more, they too have faith in our vision of transparency and accountability in ensuring that taxpayer dollars are used effectively and efficiently. I know that many of you have already voted and many more have a plan to vote between now and November 3rd. Please keep pushing - encourage your friends and family to vote. You can help our campaign to continue messaging to voters by making a [contribution HERE.](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/7LAM_QfsVHvc7ATSt1m6-ca9EZMlavdXJJizmjxXxXA=) The stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines. [Can you please help me today with $5, $10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of PA? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/7LAM_QfsVHvc7ATSt1m6-ca9EZMlavdXJJizmjxXxXA=) Thank you for your vote and your support Humbly Yours, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/G2TP1wnIsj7IGa0_RkgSQxJ_vj4e6Fam2E2tlCKzwYY=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/7LAM_QfsVHvc7ATSt1m6-ca9EZMlavdXJJizmjxXxXA=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/L0xxx4LWLMHET4sm7d-mM1-c7q6NQxYk5Mu3MyDSe3o=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/JP-crfz9fbdyqsKW6wyBMqYQpcL47NlNCwJ6sZJnQnA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/moiDJ7-KA29bgDB30pIUjpcaLyvlEXrkQzPDNANc1AM=/6AzWL-C7U1D8oalBEHUjKwf5Z5xScE2r6Xh48bb6FZw=?hl=en)

Friend,

I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Donald Trump is the best President in the HISTORY of our Nation, and it’s all because of great Patriots like YOU.

We need FOUR MORE YEARS of his INCREDIBLE leadership, and that’s why we need YOU to step up and help us reach our FINAL End-of-Month Deadline of the Election.

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Charlie Crist is trying to drown us out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
You can tell he's worried. Wait until you see this.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tavbiK7mhsvx6s9nt3ah2VHKtfea2CEN8XQtfcZco9PQzxEF33gauhpIUxzXOhF034Kk1FVtA9IzP4g3h44BV6NbAarPnappgWnrZWsGbInwDyx6F-HOJ-V7sYl6sqTF5KSHFQohVOuhQm4Qjr-T6APhcDO_GoOAY472LqBsfL-DZmrwk9kIOdF3k2Wx5AtHMoaPpMP4-wD2wBFZLgrkZMYJxtpDcqkJ9ydGS3PlISCRBZnqCOjeqjVuvdMsB-emj5jNbh8U4SoqdouRninFaHk5hrTTvAaKI2tvk4cV5zpgM_oOZXtb4g==&c=YveqnEtotmOXQTUaLBDli-SbofDo3utcym7-jUzmPRa-Mjr3Eluf0Q==&ch=UyXGdNJ_G07YEHjt8Rq2ageIhnR5DW2dkSecv_lh-3ZhT5QqouHyaQ==)
---
Friend,
---
Charlie Crist released a new ad trying to brand himself as the pro-veteran candidate.
---
This is _further proof_ that he's threatened by us. He knows that voters love the fact that I'm an Air Force veteran, so he's trying to take the spotlight off of our campaign.
---
I refuse to let Charlie Crist drown out my story as a veteran, so I'm going to double my ad-buy goal for the final week of the election.
---
[**Please make a contribution toward our final ad-buy goal to get our ad out to every voter in the district.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tavbiK7mhsvx6s9nt3ah2VHKtfea2CEN8XQtfcZco9PQzxEF33gauhpIUxzXOhF034Kk1FVtA9IzP4g3h44BV6NbAarPnappgWnrZWsGbInwDyx6F-HOJ-V7sYl6sqTF5KSHFQohVOuhQm4Qjr-T6APhcDO_GoOAY472LqBsfL-DZmrwk9kIOdF3k2Wx5AtHMoaPpMP4-wD2wBFZLgrkZMYJxtpDcqkJ9ydGS3PlISCRBZnqCOjeqjVuvdMsB-emj5jNbh8U4SoqdouRninFaHk5hrTTvAaKI2tvk4cV5zpgM_oOZXtb4g==&c=YveqnEtotmOXQTUaLBDli-SbofDo3utcym7-jUzmPRa-Mjr3Eluf0Q==&ch=UyXGdNJ_G07YEHjt8Rq2ageIhnR5DW2dkSecv_lh-3ZhT5QqouHyaQ==)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/f6bef26f29268ab8?utm_campaign=20201028&utm_medium=email&utm_source=CI_B&utm_content=16&amount=250)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tavbiK7mhsvx6s9nt3ah2VHKtfea2CEN8XQtfcZco9PQzxEF33gauhpIUxzXOhF034Kk1FVtA9IzP4g3h44BV6NbAarPnappgWnrZWsGbInwDyx6F-HOJ-V7sYl6sqTF5KSHFQohVOuhQm4Qjr-T6APhcDO_GoOAY472LqBsfL-DZmrwk9kIOdF3k2Wx5AtHMoaPpMP4-wD2wBFZLgrkZMYJxtpDcqkJ9ydGS3PlISCRBZnqCOjeqjVuvdMsB-emj5jNbh8U4SoqdouRninFaHk5hrTTvAaKI2tvk4cV5zpgM_oOZXtb4g==&c=YveqnEtotmOXQTUaLBDli-SbofDo3utcym7-jUzmPRa-Mjr3Eluf0Q==&ch=UyXGdNJ_G07YEHjt8Rq2ageIhnR5DW2dkSecv_lh-3ZhT5QqouHyaQ==)**
---
**_Unlike swamp politicians like Charlie Crist, I actually know what it 's like to be willing to put my life on the line for our country._**
---
That's why voters are rallying behind our campaign like never before in history.
---
I dedicated my life to America when I served in the U.S. Air Force, and I'm ready to take that same duty and love of country straight to the halls of Congress.
---
Meanwhile, Charlie Crist _refuses_ to stand up to the anti-police mob in his party that disrespects our flag and demeans our country's values.
---
Every single day members of our military work tirelessly to protect America's great cities, yet when anarchists tried to burn them down, Charlie let it happen.
---
America's bravest deserve a leader who will RESPECT their service and stand up to those who disgrace our flag and our country.
---
Together, we can give our veterans the representation they _deserve_ and stand up to the Democrat mob once and for all.
---
[**So please, make a contribution toward our final ad-buy goal of the election -- and let 's FIRE Charlie Crist from Congress.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tavbiK7mhsvx6s9nt3ah2VHKtfea2CEN8XQtfcZco9PQzxEF33gauhpIUxzXOhF034Kk1FVtA9IzP4g3h44BV6NbAarPnappgWnrZWsGbInwDyx6F-HOJ-V7sYl6sqTF5KSHFQohVOuhQm4Qjr-T6APhcDO_GoOAY472LqBsfL-DZmrwk9kIOdF3k2Wx5AtHMoaPpMP4-wD2wBFZLgrkZMYJxtpDcqkJ9ydGS3PlISCRBZnqCOjeqjVuvdMsB-emj5jNbh8U4SoqdouRninFaHk5hrTTvAaKI2tvk4cV5zpgM_oOZXtb4g==&c=YveqnEtotmOXQTUaLBDli-SbofDo3utcym7-jUzmPRa-Mjr3Eluf0Q==&ch=UyXGdNJ_G07YEHjt8Rq2ageIhnR5DW2dkSecv_lh-3ZhT5QqouHyaQ==)
---
Thank you,
---

---
Anna Paulina Luna
Air Force Veteran

name: Angel Arroyo
subject: “Jesus, help”
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) Fellow American, I never thought I'd be writing you a letter like this. But then again, I never thought my husband John would survive three deployments to Afghanistan and Iraq and a dozen years serving in the Special Forces as a Green Beret... _...only to be gunned down 9 miles from our home at Fort Hood Army Base._ But that's exactly what happened when a crazed attacker opened fire on base. John had just arrived to his unit headquarters and was walking from his car when he heard shots. The second he turned to locate the shooter, another shot rang out and he was hit. Out of nowhere a 45-calibur slug ripped through John's throat severing his jugular. Gasping for breath, my John fell to the ground -- but wasn't about to give up. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) [John and Angel Arroyo at their home dedication. You can give the gift of home to another deserving military family right now - click to support Operation Finally Home today!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) He used all his strength to stumble towards an approaching soldier for help. And then he realized that soldier was the shooter. **" Jesus, help."** John prayed because he knew there was no way he would get out of this alive on his own. And then during the longest minute of John's life... the shooter stopped, looked right past him, and continued into a nearby building. _John was spared._ No one but John knew where the shooter had gone and so when 3 other brave soldiers arrived on the scene and came to John's aid... ...although bleeding from his throat at an alarming rate, John managed to whisper, "He's in the brigade." While John was struggling for his life, I was at home doing the regular things I do every day. I had no idea that just a few miles away, our lives were changing forever until a friend called to tell me there was an active shooter on base. When John's Captain showed up at our front door 30 minutes later, I couldn't bring myself to open it. I went numb. John's Captain was on the other side of the door knocking and knocking with news of whether John was alive or dead. And I was crumpled on the other side of the door, shaking my head 'no' because I didn't want to hear what he might say. **And then came the most beautiful words I 'd ever heard, "Open the door, he's alive!"** Doctors say it's a miracle that my husband survived that day. Even with John's quick intervention, four service members died and 16 more were injured. Every day, I thank God for sparing my husband. And every day I pray He'll give us the strength to face the horrible scars the shooting left on John and our family. I'll never forget when they first let me see John in the hospital. I would not have recognized him as my husband of 11 years. The only way he could breathe was through a tracheostomy tube in his neck. The next few months involved a medically induced coma, painful surgery, and grueling rehab. But afterward my husband, like all the brave men and women who sacrifice everything for their country, would say, "It was going to take a lot more than a .45 to take a Green Beret out." **He never complained. He never gave up.** When doctors said his voice box was damaged beyond repair, two months later John was talking again. When they said he'd never use his arm again because the bullet had lodged deep into the nerves of his shoulder, John fought through months of intense rehab to regain use of his hand. But as brave as he was in his physical recovery, under the surface, my husband was broken. No matter where we were - the grocery store, the doctor, or even church - he would scan the room with hyper-vigilance, constantly on the lookout for danger. There were endless nights worrying about how he would ever provide for us and be the husband and father he had been before the shooting. John's life being spared was a miracle. **But now we prayed for another miracle to get our family through our uncertain and fragile future living with John 's disabilities.** When they say that God works in mysterious ways, they aren't kidding. Because our second miracle was a cowboy named Dan Wallrath who walked into our lives during our darkest time and told us we had been chosen to receive a specially adapted, mortgage-free home from an organization called Operation FINALLY HOME. The miracle home would be built specially to accommodate John's injuries and it would be funded entirely by the American people as a "Thank You" for John's service. What can I tell you about this home? That it saved our family by putting a roof over our heads? Yes. That it saved John knowing his family was safe in a secure home of our own? Yes. **That at Fort Hood John stood face-to-face with evil and every day this home reminds him that _people are good,_ that _God is good_ , and that the sacrifice he made serving our country was worth something?** Yes. This house -- built with the love and generosity and respect from the American people -- does all that. That cowboy, Dan Wallrath, founded Operation FINALLY HOME 15 years ago to provide severely wounded, ill, or injured veterans and widows of the fallen with the #1 most impactful "Thank You" they could ever receive from the American people... ...specially adapted, mortgage-free homes to call their own. Dan saw the plight of our veterans who came home from Iraq and Afghanistan with brain injuries, without limbs, with severe burns, and much more. Often these brave warriors can't dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks -- _never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table for their families._ **That 's why Operation FINALLY HOME builds these miracle homes to accommodate each veteran's specific injuries to make everyday tasks easier.** **[And that's why I hope you'll help another family like mine today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==)**
* If a veteran needs all the family bedrooms on the first floor so he or she can get to their toddler more quickly on their prosthetic legs - they give it to them.
* If a veteran who's lost his legs and arms - or both - needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent - they do it.
* If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder) episodes filled with the screams of their wounded platoon mates - they build it.

Whatever a veteran needs to live the rest of their lives as independently as possible, they provide it. And they gift the home to the deserving family 100% mortgage-free so a severely wounded veteran never has to spend another anguished night worrying, "How will I ever take care of my family again?" But Operation FINALLY HOME doesn't do this life-changing work alone. #1. Dan's first step in providing a mortgage-free, specially adapted home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran is to find a builder who's willing to donate his services free of charge. #2. Then Dan turns to the local community for donations of the land and building materials. #3. Then Dan finds a family to bless with this miracle. #4. [And the final step in building this miracle home involves you.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) **After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, Dan and his team at Operation FINALLY HOME have to come up with $87,500 to finish building one home.** That certainly seems like a lot of money to me. But Dan says he always knew that with God's help he'd be able to raise that $87,500 for each and every home. Why? Because Dan believed in the American people. He knew if he could just find those patriots who wanted to help, they would respond like wildfire. **And that 's why I'm writing to you today.** Dan and Operation FINALLY HOME have changed the lives of an amazing 191 wounded veterans and their families - including ours. **[Will you help them build their next specially-adapted, mortgage-free home for Aaron Zurn and his family?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==)** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) [Brittany and Aaron Zurn with the children. Will you help us build their home with a generous gift today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) U.S. Marine Corps Sgt. Aaron Zurn served for a decade, deploying twice to Afghanistan and twice to Iraq. In his final deployment, Aaron fell from a helicopter, changing his life -- and his family's -- forever. Before the accident, Aaron and his wife Brittany spoke every day. When she couldn't get in touch with him for four days, she knew something had gone horribly wrong. And she knew exactly what I felt like to have her relief and gratitude that her husband was alive quickly turn to fear and worry as they learned they were changed forever. Following his accident, Aaron's mental capacity regressed to that of a 13 year old. He suffers from Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), bilateral hearing loss. Brittany -- once a stay at home mom -- has become his caregiver, and provides for their family. **Will you be part of a miracle for a military family who 's sacrificed everything for our country?** [Help Build the Zurn Family Home - Donate Now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) Your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever amount you feel is right... ...helps give one veteran a home where he or she can navigate their wheelchair easily, reach kitchen counters to help with dinner... ...allows a veteran to rest easier knowing that their family will always have a roof over their heads... ...and maybe most importantly, your tax-deductible gift to build this home, tells a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran loud and clear that you care about their sacrifice. And that means everything to men like my husband John and his fellow veterans. I wish you could have heard John talk about it on the day we walked into our Operation FINALLY HOME for the first time. Not too long ago I feared John would never be able to speak again and there he was, his voice breaking from emotion, doing his best to thank the American people just for caring. In honor of Dan's 15th year serving our wounded, ill, and injured veterans, John and I have made it our mission to help him build at least 15 homes this year alone. **[Will you help us?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==)** I can tell you from experience, that your gift is saving a family. However much you decide to help today, thank you for reading my family's story. Patriots like you make me so proud to be an American. Thank you and God bless you and your family during this unprecedented time for our country, Gratefully, Angel Arroyo P.S. Your tax-deductible gift helps build a specially-adapted, mortgage-free home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran during these critical times. A place to call home is the #1 "Thank You!" we could ever give those who've given everything for our country. **[Please help a deserving military family today with your tax-deductible gift.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) **Thank you and stay well! [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==) Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support Operation FINALLY HOME today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSmV-3GJjyplsMRPA6hkG02HV17HD5SuFB0H7AwyuMrSq3-Yv2s38PXyKKnFSMJGl0ydOGLUX1iM411MAXEhsw6bQyqA6FKpDl5-ne2oJVdPyS9JOIkDknkNckdlPNaRJXY3k7xiUvNOaHqwx1ssIqCQtBxqB9U2NWiz-nckeCq_W7jNQl3AdK4Kj_luM2KXloQ==&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==)** (C) Operation FINALLY HOME | [www.operationfinallyhome.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001046tSHiJB2n7shVuBO2G90LL2wX84SMpal1f3CjMYOqcHAtvn25ZSibXEPe98ZqFP8-k2lw-Cytij3gCY19k2K38rPo3F8fDIGx0KjQR-T5G_eSrnQ9SP7yQ4NJEvvmmLV3q9Qsew4BzYKvRH_P4mXobm3XbAaKT&c=9JTr5jeuyw4a4Q6DmazXj_iAs4U2v2gPYavX5P_5Fo0GKUgfv8sIDQ==&ch=NhXGHgq3Nto_2F0WlO7Ty8BBgqFCDfU2d2Mq2hiAD5yBsvm8AmqV9w==)

The second he turned to locate the shooter, another shot rang out and he was hit. Out of nowhere a 45-calibur slug ripped through John's throat severing his jugular. Often these brave warriors can't dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks -- never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table for their families. That 's why Operation FINALLY HOME builds these miracle homes to accommodate each veteran's specific injuries to make everyday tasks easier. == If a veteran needs all the family bedrooms on the first floor so he or she can get to their toddler more quickly on their prosthetic legs - they give it to them. If a veteran who's lost his legs and arms - or both - needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent - they do it. If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder) episodes filled with the screams of their wounded platoon mates - they build it. Whatever a veteran needs to live the rest of their lives as independently as possible, they provide it. And they gift the home to the deserving family 100% mortgage-free so a severely wounded veteran never has to spend another anguished night worrying, "How will I ever take care of my family again?" But Operation FINALLY HOME doesn't do this life-changing work alone. #1. Dan's first step in providing a mortgage-free, specially adapted home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran is to find a builder who's willing to donate his services free of charge. #2. Then Dan turns to the local community for donations of the land and building materials. #3. Then Dan finds a family to bless with this miracle. #4. == After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, Dan and his team at Operation FINALLY HOME have to come up with $87,500 to finish building one home. That certainly seems like a lot of money to me. But Dan says he always knew that with God's help he'd be able to raise that $87,500 for each and every home. Why? Because Dan believed in the American people. He knew if he could just find those patriots who wanted to help, they would respond like wildfire. And that 's why I'm writing to you today. Dan and Operation FINALLY HOME have changed the lives of an amazing 191 wounded veterans and their families - including ours. == == == U.S. Marine Corps Sgt. Aaron Zurn served for a decade, deploying twice to Afghanistan and twice to Iraq. In his final deployment, Aaron fell from a helicopter, changing his life -- and his family's -- forever. Before the accident, Aaron and his wife Brittany spoke every day. When she couldn't get in touch with him for four days, she knew something had gone horribly wrong. And she knew exactly what I felt like to have her relief and gratitude that her husband was alive quickly turn to fear and worry as they learned they were changed forever. Following his accident, Aaron's mental capacity regressed to that of a 13 year old. He suffers from Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), bilateral hearing loss. Brittany -- once a stay at home mom -- has become his caregiver, and provides for their family. Will you be part of a miracle for a military family who 's sacrificed everything for our country? == Your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever amount you feel is right... ...helps give one veteran a home where he or she can navigate their wheelchair easily, reach kitchen counters to help with dinner... ...allows a veteran to rest easier knowing that their family will always have a roof over their heads... ...and maybe most importantly, your tax-deductible gift to build this home, tells a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran loud and clear that you care about their sacrifice. And that means everything to men like my husband John and his fellow veterans. I wish you could have heard John talk about it on the day we walked into our Operation FINALLY HOME for the first time. Not too long ago I feared John would never be able to speak again and there he was, his voice breaking from emotion, doing his best to thank the American people just for caring. In honor of Dan's 15th year serving our wounded, ill, and injured veterans, John and I have made it our mission to help him build at least 15 homes this year alone. == I can tell you from experience, that your gift is saving a family. However much you decide to help today, thank you for reading my family's story. Patriots like you make me so proud to be an American. Thank you and God bless you and your family during this unprecedented time for our country, Gratefully, Angel Arroyo P.S. Your tax-deductible gift helps build a specially-adapted, mortgage-free home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran during these critical times. A place to call home is the #1 "Thank You!" we could ever give those who've given everything for our country. == Thank you and stay well! == Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. ==** (C) Operation FINALLY HOME | == 1659 State Highway 46 West, Suite 115-606, New Braunfels, TX 78132 == | | Operation FINALLY HOME | 1659 State Highway 46 West, Suite 115-606, New Braunfels, TX 78132 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

I told you that he was spending $2.5 million to defeat me -- but I just got word that he UPPED his spend to $5 MILLION with only one week to go until the election.

Let me make it clear: **_he hates me, because I 'm fighting for YOU._**

_He knows that I can 't be bought and that I'm rejecting special interest money because I know it comes with strings attached. And I'm ONLY beholden to the people._

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Our final push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
I could really use your help with less than 1 week to go.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ae-T9i_vaBm2seS5QcEK5yek1_InVal4lzBbup62kszgnRVUG8xAoNbCce7rOzQDU25-cJj2Lg353HXWPb8LsnXrD3kuZ7DHDHlJClFZ0sipc13NEXYOzgRiuMBfhWk0lEqMN0CfaSlfPk7lVrSnNS24hTYrbNgW7E10sdAFKDXWPndymC3ILmkmXUUEr8qiln8Iv2npd6pVbTXETiqY04ifmrgsNdj1x5BAoC6J_L42lZlyOrteqHLwQhnA3vocwS1tgHa-gRk45DRMIAQQM2-yaZ8oADSPvToagUk5ct-r8AxRnxK4yA==&c=RAoWCztGcj3eR-seae-kXJqIKSVSu01SGBmFh18t7cA9-F4BF4bQ6A==&ch=AWWAQUBPFV6-3yMlQR0-m93x9-tIBZoWGV-W69-YdKPxbtUzr-yJTA==)
---
Friend,
---
I know it's hard to believe, but _the election is less than a week away._
---
All of our hard work comes down to this... but I'm afraid we still have a long way to go.
---
Our team is still $53,837 short of our Election Day Fund, and these resources are absolutely **vital** to our final ad-buys, early voting initiatives, and Election Day GOTV efforts.
---
**_Never forget that Republicans lost this seat in 2018 because we got outraised by about $800,000. Money _will_ make the difference._**
---

We only have six days left to save our Senate Majority. Todd is working hard to secure support in key battleground states right now, but he needs your help to ensure we make it across the finish line.
Friend, we're in the home stretch.

We only have**six days left to save our Senate Majority.** Todd is working hard to secure support in key battleground states right now, but he needs your help to ensure we make it across the finish line.

There is too much on the line this year to sit idly by. If Republicans lose just 4 seats, we're in serious danger of the radical Left overturning your key Constitutional freedoms and liberties. Can you step up right now and help Todd and Senate Republicans across the finish line?

Dear Friend,

One of the most important Congressional races in the country is in Michigan's 8th District. This battleground district was represented by a Republican for decades, but in 2018, Democrat Elissa Slotkin slipped into office by pretending to be a moderate.

Guess what? This Democrat politician who talked like a moderate to win went to Washington, D.C. and fell in line with Nancy Pelosi. Slotkin helped lead the impeachment effort, supports massive tax increases and stripping away our Second Amendment Rights.

I am asking you to help support conservative Republican Paul Junge to help us recapture this seat. Paul served in the Trump administration, working to secure the border, and Paul's family business has created more than 500 jobs.

President Trump endorsed Paul, because he knows Paul will fight for our conservative values and that he can win. This battleground district was represented by a Republican for decades, but in 2018, Democrat Elissa Slotkin slipped into office by pretending to be a moderate. Guess what? This Democrat politician who talked like a moderate to win went to Washington, D.C. and fell in line with Nancy Pelosi. I am asking you to help support conservative Republican Paul Junge to help us recapture this seat. name: Jason Lewis
subject: Falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
While the polls like tight, our fundraising numberse show a different story

Dear Friend,

**I wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't necessary - there are only FOUR days until the last monthly fundraising deadline of the 2020 cycle - and polls show my campaign is within ONE POINT of Far-Left Tina Smith.**

While the polls look good, our fundraising numbers show a different story.

The latest fundraising reports show we are trailing the Democrats with only ONE WEEK until Election Day.

We're falling behind in a critical time period, and we cannot afford to lose any more ground. I'm so grateful to have one of the best grassroots teams in the nation, but I must call on you to step up and help us secure the Republican Majority and fight off the angry liberal mobs who will stop at nothing to obstruct President Trump and hardworking Republicans.

**That's why we've activated 500% matching on all donations through 11:59 on October 31 - don't wait to make a difference, every minute counts!**

[Donate $25 matched to $125](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqBpzQP97A77nspbF1OOlz5SDxE_yMOFmSuDKOfH79NXa8ahN67dyvlO9R6O3zK3q4i2lGJvAFFb4UK65BRd8EXIf1Ftpg1fcmzV5jmyMsNPkuHGzmDM9lD0jT2neWUhBDOx4ko7Hx02AsuayGSkID_PikmiQHREBUxt07FFZihtRe1_DAVGl8ELwTuuij_u7gjUsXHUhUIHpr6Mtqcnqi8s5niTFJvCPk_XJX4mhQPmTjEiULkn_F_WTPQN8TH7MK7mW9aIcDB3HV3pitr5O63vx_H4XzXlVRYeMaMoJZ6V1F-hH5d0nCQvoJp5Wli-u5-nJUvHJJozdH_BIfdb-G7YOKCNlRhowhQy8lUvCoWkxm_EjxwQyOy0tdPiY2vxE45lCrMH8QntNEF6fNmwOWg7UN2wubusGEZdzCYLAibge58hvWa9fw==&c=0MB-E74cNLruFAV8dyXXA_QS_T-El-RYiG_DpPYkl3s-PKsbabcvqA==&ch=oDVf_lpQEei4v_0dH1DiKosNsyvCP6V4guTznOViIWrZZjuM237W8w==)**

The Democrats have lost any sense of civility and respect for political discourse. If it doesn't align with their views, they'll go down kicking and screaming. Just look at how they treated Judge Kavanaugh, how they are treating Judge Barrett, and how they burn and destroy cities whenever they don't get their way.

**The radical progressives are leading a dangerous charge** and their party leaders and key figures, including my opponent Tina Smith, refuse to denounce these violent riots and irresponsible actions. It's incredibly disappointing, demonstrating how unfit they are to lead.

[**Make a 5X matched donation before our deadline!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqBpzQP97A77nspbF1OOlz5SDxE_yMOFmSuDKOfH79NXa8ahN67dyvlO9R6O3zK3W3qP2V84AWvkjnVSCkPkJSNbRQ1IiGRO64tqI4hwMvBmxmrIxqwtFIvs4zWCHHBXdbam-rBkuZEjMZXOF72372H3EmImadA5zCg09E5jjn1zeKoyl8Fk2TeFxfVA6LoPVdnb78jPirA7HmPTjaJsmG66cLFt-fvyZJ4old1QBvWR-b7oHqC8NBU69xYbDqhsXI-vZQRME3EjwhX_KbDgnvAZKqHlCPx_zG8d7jwiQ84i9mk3rpZGqio0KHl97diV0e1PLKJzFDoBHfMWrKvcuKpaaqKE_RtOs5lHTkUwrJMaQ70jFWedeVmNVYL7mK8RwBR1VgaPSyaetvJvTAFxQ5vaOaG5En86&c=0MB-E74cNLruFAV8dyXXA_QS_T-El-RYiG_DpPYkl3s-PKsbabcvqA==&ch=oDVf_lpQEei4v_0dH1DiKosNsyvCP6V4guTznOViIWrZZjuM237W8w==)

The Left's mob mentality knows no boundaries, Friend.

In just a few short days, Minnesota and all of America will be faced with a critical decision: violence, obstruction and incivility, OR progress, forward movement, and a strong nation.

The choice is clear.

**We need to keep the Republican Majority and move forward with President Trump's agenda.** Let's keep up the great American comeback, rebuild our economy from the COVID-19 impact, clear Obamacare off the books, stand with our law enforcement, protect our Second Amendment, and help President Trump put America FIRST!

Let's get to work, Friend. I'm counting on you to help us bring this home.

The only way we can take on the Democrats--their angry mobs and their massive fundraising hauls--is if proud patriots like you join the fight and help us secure the Republican Majority.

**[< < 500% match your contribution today>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TqBpzQP97A77nspbF1OOlz5SDxE_yMOFmSuDKOfH79NXa8ahN67dyvlO9R6O3zK3W3qP2V84AWvkjnVSCkPkJSNbRQ1IiGRO64tqI4hwMvBmxmrIxqwtFIvs4zWCHHBXdbam-rBkuZEjMZXOF72372H3EmImadA5zCg09E5jjn1zeKoyl8Fk2TeFxfVA6LoPVdnb78jPirA7HmPTjaJsmG66cLFt-fvyZJ4old1QBvWR-b7oHqC8NBU69xYbDqhsXI-vZQRME3EjwhX_KbDgnvAZKqHlCPx_zG8d7jwiQ84i9mk3rpZGqio0KHl97diV0e1PLKJzFDoBHfMWrKvcuKpaaqKE_RtOs5lHTkUwrJMaQ70jFWedeVmNVYL7mK8RwBR1VgaPSyaetvJvTAFxQ5vaOaG5En86&c=0MB-E74cNLruFAV8dyXXA_QS_T-El-RYiG_DpPYkl3s-PKsbabcvqA==&ch=oDVf_lpQEei4v_0dH1DiKosNsyvCP6V4guTznOViIWrZZjuM237W8w==)**

body:
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e1/53d9897e/55697367/1c88c9b9/3575021927/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gop-pac?refcode=20201028_f_1_nd__910__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---

Derek --

We'll keep this short, because the headline above says it all.

**A GOP super PAC has been pouring millions of dollars into keeping the Senate under Republican control.** There's no way to sugarcoat that, but there is a way to make sure they don't succeed. We need to re-elect the Democratic senators we already have -- folks like Mark Warner -- to make sure we have a strong foundation as we build toward a blue Senate.

[**Chip in to re-elect Mark Warner, so we have a path to a blue Senate this year.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e1/53d9897e/55697367/1c88c9b8/3575021927/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gop-pac?refcode=20201028_f_1_nd__910__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

We can flip the Senate this year -- but only if we're able to fight back against this late money. And a critical part of the strategy to win the Senate is re-electing Democratic senators who are already serving. If Mark Warner loses, our chances to flip the Senate evaporate.

[**If you can, please consider chipping in to keep Mark Warner in the Senate and preserve our path to a blue Senate.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e1/53d9897e/55697367/1c88c9b8/3575021927/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gop-pac?refcode=20201028_f_1_nd__910__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you!

-- Team Warner

We need to re-elect the Democratic senators we already have -- folks like Mark Warner -- to make sure we have a strong foundation as we build toward a blue Senate. "" We can flip the Senate this year -- but only if we're able to fight back against this late money. And a critical part of the strategy to win the Senate is re-electing Democratic senators who are already serving. If Mark Warner loses, our chances to flip the Senate evaporate. "" Thank you! -- Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: MJ
subject: My Purple Heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d92/2089631735/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

There's a Purple Heart emblem on my license plate. More than once, folks have kindly stopped to say thank you for serving -- but they direct it to my husband. He politely corrects them. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d91/2089631735/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201028.1nd__2428__&amount=10")
---
**I 'm used to people underestimating me.** The Washington establishment underestimated me when I took them on to open military jobs to women. Now Sen. Cornyn is underestimating me and my team. He knows he's in trouble -- he wouldn't be calling in his allies to bail him out otherwise -- and with just one week left, he's fighting like a cornered snake. He knows that **[I have the support of folks like you.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d91/2089631735/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201028.1nd__2428__&amount=10")**

Not too many people know Sen. Cornyn around here, since he's spent 18 years in Washington peddling legislative favors to the special interests in exchange for campaign cash. Those who do know him don't much like him. Texans have a sensitive BS meter, and they know that despite his three terms in the Senate, he hasn't done diddly squat for us.

**Now, I won 't lie, defeating a three-term incumbent senator won't be easy.** But I've got the scars on my arm and the Purple Heart on my license plate to remind me that I've been through **tougher situations** and made it out on top. Most of all -- I have you and a grassroots army on my side. **[Will you help me finish this race strong?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d91/2089631735/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201028.1nd__2428__&amount=10")**
\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d91/2089631735/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201028.1nd__2428__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d90/2089631735/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2428&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891deb/7f51f7bc/597cb30c/4efb3d97/2089631735/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas

Round Rock, TX 78683

body:
Friend, Al Gross is a Democrat trying to run as an Independent in order to deceive voters and hand control of Alaska over to Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi.

Don't believe us?

_**-> Liberal Al Gross and his campaign have accepted MILLIONS in campaign donations from national Democrats.

-> Liberal Al Gross has raised a majority of his money OUTSIDE of Alaska. He gets his donors from liberal strongholds like New York, Seattle and San Francisco.

-> Liberal Al Gross has received MILLIONS of dollars in aid from ultra-left PACs and ZERO dollars from any 'independent' organization.** _

Still not convinced? [**These are his own words:**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016Mg-d5vhlLUEtv3XfJqRVO09SmwYxe2HoAhWZD9j_2w6rpZPx85nw2geL27p2088v69_aG9Ur3obgWw0w1lhEPnIca8qXnVuIvalFHW8VAj6Nx17K0P4IzhiQ2Mr3OdbT1nOV17sUM-oYn7zmHgsITHhwUTRYkj9g0p_0FmWRLfbNVAJrsK7D6phPuZ-HJabsNIu1M7PfpFnopQ3G0nrHiyoTbkQRh3YeXOAzyEvVQwwiMM6B77dEHpCLWh1bwPCPzVvjRtQEjn7dsCSL-i8l1OmC52Uo_TfCSKyx5KHQV7BOz5lHp0UruwOV8F3WjmdHcaXmFO2rz_XdRHe91s-1TfVWloOYugjRK4s5yjY99r6QZ4-S3ppUev2xUDdieMxv6uG4KNlGwBPdDJ5v4hQIjicr2k7EMtvWBqzSgajB9EHIOA5MKvUj48P-OILXtKw8qdO3uyDXLG9wdse4zEGzrUafnV9trxJqNIVZOdYbD0=&c=B1JGnAasvZ8NcQxWLrXTg4o29W5KrIkR-MNV3PmyMBhHaEPOfL2SsQ==&ch=8H7utXuuitAxlx9QWstay7gvN9ow2jsBhEVLnE3ankzZyKVfqZBtaw==)

body:
State races across the country are going to come down to the wire.
Friend,
Critical state races across the country are going to come down to the wire -- and with as few as **42 state legislative races** potentially determining as much as a **136-seat swing in the U.S. House** , it's crucial we have what it takes to WIN these elections after November 3rd.
So that's where we need your help: We're BEHIND on our October fundraising goal. Our budget is already stretched to the limit, and if we don't meet our goals, we might not have the resources necessary to WIN our closest races in KEY battleground states across the country.
[**For the next 24 hours, all donations will be 5x MATCHED in order to ensure we have what we need to DEFEAT the radical left on Election Day. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W-N3AAcNjr8fEPiJTu4IH0tiq56zZJY19LAY5-aQO0RaTXiDbkRZmifKHKkwjx410hYJfaFMbKIgcl9NT1K8xeCcZwtqlvm9vywuCX-ueArJpyTf3RvwPMXAGzxFIdZeI1KEQ_V7GwIj-s01mdDeFS18SzT1u93X4xVGoJ_tOV56QQtJGn8bkg3inpUZsb81mzSNarZ3KUmQ5PhV0yEYdVcIKcOs7i0ieoCACmsntlUaGPonH0Il_docjzrIL-nlqtY41sHsQuBNHOWN6QO0GvloGPbRrw5j6nVtdy03IoJEqHwMINm8Y4eXYffSQbr6BFw_D3buyLL2mSY0paBKV4PWRdR35DjOZlGj1dU2M2ejBtgdFRWQVJ_wI6qVK4Wa284XRL5TywdfeWHrzzZ-gJ3FXzAEp7edBhfaAvOCLN7ZkF7iVGzC2g==&c=MjinKkYV1yKcpN5FFP5B04d2sZI1STjG6pTbbqwEJIdx_RidafFrzw==&ch=aM9-366NiA51_l_Zfh29qDimeiyoqP07mQojBqSwNfNtpKbW9HoQwg==)

Friend,

Democrats have admitted that Arizona is the key to the Senate Majority and the White House. **Joe Biden 's campaign manager even said, "if we win Arizona, we will win the presidency." **

Now, President Trump is coming to Arizona, and we need to show we have the momentum to defend this battleground. Joe Biden launched a massive ad blitz and more ads are running in Phoenix, Arizona than any market in the nation!

**We set a goal to raise $15O,OOO by[ midnight tonight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W-N3AAcNjr8fEPiJTu4IH0tiq56zZJY19LAY5-aQO0RaTXiDbkRZmifKHKkwjx410hYJfaFMbKIgcl9NT1K8xeCcZwtqlvm9vywuCX-ueArJpyTf3RvwPMXAGzxFIdZeI1KEQ_V7GwIj-s01mdDeFS18SzT1u93X4xVGoJ_tOV56QQtJGn8bkg3inpUZsb81mzSNarZ3KUmQ5PhV0yEYdVcIKcOs7i0ieoCACmsntlUaGPonH0Il_docjzrIL-nlqtY41sHsQuBNHOWN6QO0GvloGPbRrw5j6nVtdy03IoJEqHwMINm8Y4eXYffSQbr6BFw_D3buyLL2mSY0paBKV4PWRdR35DjOZlGj1dU2M2ejBtgdFRWQVJ_wI6qVK4Wa284XRL5TywdfeWHrzzZ-gJ3FXzAEp7edBhfaAvOCLN7ZkF7iVGzC2g==&c=MjinKkYV1yKcpN5FFP5B04d2sZI1STjG6pTbbqwEJIdx_RidafFrzw==&ch=aM9-366NiA51_l_Zfh29qDimeiyoqP07mQojBqSwNfNtpKbW9HoQwg==) so we can keep Arizona RED! Can you help? **[**Pitch in to our Battleground Fund to help hold the Senate and the White House.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W-N3AAcNjr8fEPiJTu4IH0tiq56zZJY19LAY5-aQO0RaTXiDbkRZmifKHKkwjx410hYJfaFMbKIgcl9NT1K8xeCcZwtqlvm9vywuCX-ueArJpyTf3RvwPMXAGzxFIdZeI1KEQ_V7GwIj-s01mdDeFS18SzT1u93X4xVGoJ_tOV56QQtJGn8bkg3inpUZsb81mzSNarZ3KUmQ5PhV0yEYdVcIKcOs7i0ieoCACmsntlUaGPonH0Il_docjzrIL-nlqtY41sHsQuBNHOWN6QO0GvloGPbRrw5j6nVtdy03IoJEqHwMINm8Y4eXYffSQbr6BFw_D3buyLL2mSY0paBKV4PWRdR35DjOZlGj1dU2M2ejBtgdFRWQVJ_wI6qVK4Wa284XRL5TywdfeWHrzzZ-gJ3FXzAEp7edBhfaAvOCLN7ZkF7iVGzC2g==&c=MjinKkYV1yKcpN5FFP5B04d2sZI1STjG6pTbbqwEJIdx_RidafFrzw==&ch=aM9-366NiA51_l_Zfh29qDimeiyoqP07mQojBqSwNfNtpKbW9HoQwg==)

My opponent has endorsed Joe Biden and was endorsed by his running mate Kamala Harris. He has raked in $38.7 million last Quarter and is one of the best-funded Democrats in the nation.

We are less than 1 week from Election Day, and millions will be poured into Arizona to turn it and the Senate blue. Can you help me fight back? [**Donate ANY amount to help me reach this important goal!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W-N3AAcNjr8fEPiJTu4IH0tiq56zZJY19LAY5-aQO0RaTXiDbkRZmifKHKkwjx410hYJfaFMbKIgcl9NT1K8xeCcZwtqlvm9vywuCX-ueArJpyTf3RvwPMXAGzxFIdZeI1KEQ_V7GwIj-s01mdDeFS18SzT1u93X4xVGoJ_tOV56QQtJGn8bkg3inpUZsb81mzSNarZ3KUmQ5PhV0yEYdVcIKcOs7i0ieoCACmsntlUaGPonH0Il_docjzrIL-nlqtY41sHsQuBNHOWN6QO0GvloGPbRrw5j6nVtdy03IoJEqHwMINm8Y4eXYffSQbr6BFw_D3buyLL2mSY0paBKV4PWRdR35DjOZlGj1dU2M2ejBtgdFRWQVJ_wI6qVK4Wa284XRL5TywdfeWHrzzZ-gJ3FXzAEp7edBhfaAvOCLN7ZkF7iVGzC2g==&c=MjinKkYV1yKcpN5FFP5B04d2sZI1STjG6pTbbqwEJIdx_RidafFrzw==&ch=aM9-366NiA51_l_Zfh29qDimeiyoqP07mQojBqSwNfNtpKbW9HoQwg==)

We are hanging by a thread right now. We've been outraised and outspent, but this race is still a dead heat. Democrats think their massive war chest can turn this battleground blue. We need to send a LOUD message and show we're ready to fight!

Don't be a bystander this election. This is the top battleground and if you don't defend this must-win state, Democrats will have a path to taking the White House and Senate. [**Pitch in now to stop a liberal takeover and help us reach our $150K goal!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W-N3AAcNjr8fEPiJTu4IH0tiq56zZJY19LAY5-aQO0RaTXiDbkRZmifKHKkwjx410hYJfaFMbKIgcl9NT1K8xeCcZwtqlvm9vywuCX-ueArJpyTf3RvwPMXAGzxFIdZeI1KEQ_V7GwIj-s01mdDeFS18SzT1u93X4xVGoJ_tOV56QQtJGn8bkg3inpUZsb81mzSNarZ3KUmQ5PhV0yEYdVcIKcOs7i0ieoCACmsntlUaGPonH0Il_docjzrIL-nlqtY41sHsQuBNHOWN6QO0GvloGPbRrw5j6nVtdy03IoJEqHwMINm8Y4eXYffSQbr6BFw_D3buyLL2mSY0paBKV4PWRdR35DjOZlGj1dU2M2ejBtgdFRWQVJ_wI6qVK4Wa284XRL5TywdfeWHrzzZ-gJ3FXzAEp7edBhfaAvOCLN7ZkF7iVGzC2g==&c=MjinKkYV1yKcpN5FFP5B04d2sZI1STjG6pTbbqwEJIdx_RidafFrzw==&ch=aM9-366NiA51_l_Zfh29qDimeiyoqP07mQojBqSwNfNtpKbW9HoQwg==)

Martha McSally

Team Mann
