name: Susan Collins
subject: The biggest attack against me yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
This is BAD.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wqi7KUw_4T10Uz0fpIoaw03Q9g9FcOmxbfW-UUp7o2c6MQ47pxn05hmhNBTHaITvSkLSSUCBD9FlOelMI_p1fgwxhgXTzBqzlYPPeFeAqwc50FYBeBup1b0LpDQbbinO_dq2Sv8pivk-AUJ5CbnauJrR0n3hUUo2Y7i9aVxM_qJrKtRWhEqLnLXf6PbF2rohCYUAAgN1SJ9JRA43WIKPvvFgml_Tce3ZJ8QlvP4KujpXUT5gVSYmSnWN3uvKPDXsbHqTszyOddadHqXXYHqNcfGL_OYQj1rCs8GCeoTqrqDPN7HOkWtO3QF5zQQ1fSb5g_RhTeS5UpykSb-NHEAyQ2yJiNTFyvF_Mx76kKgQ73naPz1pYUR2E5KVZzm7Qjk_yWUMajrzls7pEwQ3-65QC7aJ0WMMjeyO&c=NA_GvqDrXZJX4uYbJP7vltM3aqx2m4cjYFxyuBHSZyhsIRLBz1laTg==&ch=8TM775DK3H0z90ng-GkDtbmKVu6iQ0_anodtRvXE1PP8kX5YGOJSeQ==)

Friend -- with only 6 days until election day, the Democrats just launched their BIGGEST attack of this race.
**In their most egregious move yet, Chuck Schumer and national Democrats bought a $3.43 MILLION ad buy during the final week of this race.** To put this into perspective, _that is more money than my campaign spent on TV during the ENTIRETY of my 2014 race._
This move has never made Chuck Schumer and my opponent's motives more clear: they are blatantly trying to buy this election. They aren't respecting the voters of Maine and will do absolutely anything to win.
[DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wqi7KUw_4T10Uz0fpIoaw03Q9g9FcOmxbfW-UUp7o2c6MQ47pxn05hmhNBTHaITvSkLSSUCBD9FlOelMI_p1fgwxhgXTzBqzlYPPeFeAqwc50FYBeBup1b0LpDQbbinO_dq2Sv8pivk-AUJ5CbnauJrR0n3hUUo2Y7i9aVxM_qJrKtRWhEqLnLXf6PbF2rohCYUAAgN1SJ9JRA43WIKPvvFgml_Tce3ZJ8QlvP4KujpXUT5gVSYmSnWN3uvKPDXsbHqTszyOddadHqXXYHqNcfGL_OYQj1rCs8GCeoTqrqDPN7HOkWtO3QF5zQQ1fSb5g_RhTeS5UpykSb-NHEAyQ2yJiNTFyvF_Mx76kKgQ73naPz1pYUR2E5KVZzm7Qjk_yWUMajrzls7pEwQ3-65QC7aJ0WMMjeyO&c=NA_GvqDrXZJX4uYbJP7vltM3aqx2m4cjYFxyuBHSZyhsIRLBz1laTg==&ch=8TM775DK3H0z90ng-GkDtbmKVu6iQ0_anodtRvXE1PP8kX5YGOJSeQ==)
---

However, we're currently STILL SHORT of our goal and there isn't a lot of time left to catch up. == == == == == == == == == I wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't CRITICAL, Friend, but to be completely honest, I've never needed your help more. == I hope I can count on you with so much on the line, Friend. Terms and Conditions ==. body:

Please take a moment to watch our final campaign ad of 2020, and **[if you are inclined to chip-in a couple bucks to help me keep this ad running through Election Day, please know how grateful we are for your continued support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56709932:WEsIKHKNR:m:1:2125848345:828D1C8658CC2E680A55185641707528:r)**.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Share this and join the movement!
body:
| | Peter, We’ve launched a national social media campaign called **_This Christian Votes_** to inspire and remind people of faith to cast their ballot. Will you participate in helping turn Christians out to vote on November 3? If we hope to see millions of non-voting Christians go to the polls, it will take each one of us to reach those on our social media accounts and within our spheres of influence. **Here is what we are asking you to do.** 1) **Post:** Share a picture of yourself on social media with a handwritten sign that includes the hashtag #ThisChristianVotes. 2) **Caption:** In your caption, share your reasons for going to the polls this election season and why #ThisChristianVotes. 3) **Tag:** Challenge three friends to participate with you and be sure to tag My Faith Votes when sharing on Facebook, Twitter or Instagram. This is our social media handle: @MyFaithVotes If you don’t use social media, please forward this email to three friends. Be sure to mention the [My Faith Votes voter guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201028com01&n=1) to help equip them to vote. **These final days are critical to motivate and equip Christians who may otherwise stay home. You have the power to influence your friends and family far more than any organization or campaign ad ever could.** Your influence makes a difference in your community and our country. Thank you for standing with us and doing all you can to preserve faith in America. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201028com01&n=2)
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Prepare NOW before it’s too late!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Join me in supporting Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

**[This election is one of the most critical and consequential in our lifetimes.](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)** We have a responsibility to ourselves, our neighbors, and our country to elect representatives who hold their constituents' best interests at heart.

In 2018, women candidates won more than 60% of the seats that Democrats flipped to win the majority in the House of Representatives. I watched closely and cheered for Abigail Spanberger from my home state in New Hampshire when she flipped Virginia's 7th district to become the first Democrat since 1968 and the first woman ever to hold the seat.

In 2016, I won my race for the United States Senate by just 1,017 votes. I know firsthand about competitive races like Abigail's, and I know that it is critical that she has the necessary resources in this final stretch.

This is why it's important for you to join me in supporting Abigail Spanberger's re-election campaign.
---
| [SUPPORT ABIGAIL ](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)
---
**[With just under seven days left, it 's imperative that we throw our full support behind Abigail and her campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)**

Abigail will continue to fight for her constituents every day in Congress: for expanded access to affordable healthcare, for investments in public education, and for rebuilding small businesses.

She will listen to the needs of those she serves and bring those concerns with her to Washington.

[_**Peter, will you join me in supporting Abigail 's campaign by contributing today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)**** I know how impactful small, grassroots donations can be, and Abigail needs them to fight back against the outside Republican spending.
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Leaders like Abigail are hard to find. She puts the interests of our country and her constituents first.

Thank you,

_Senator Hassan
U.S. Senator of New Hampshire_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3KKVvbyb1_2hX1nZkbTyi_Q9ErL5cEKVNcEGPIVI-Y=/KQEpTyiqJMkGGgyviIH_tgjr-pC1fwn3TD4mbw09Ij4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201028-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Dems just can't stop calling me 'token'
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Democrats just can't help themselves. It seems almost every day I am called a "token" by a prominent Democrat. These aren't just folks on social media, Congressman Clyburn is in House Leadership and from my home state of South Carolina. Shame on him and shame on every person who calls me a "token" for simply being a proud, Black conservative. We cannot allow these comments to go unanswered. Will you stand with me?
Friend,
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U75EdWjNrAmHzmcLggX8ecKQySHEvI1-wPygXkkiPmBwtn-NK50ECMmLikr5sU_VuB1zbRqMUOLn8NvK5yP9eHttL5taCpGK9YsAfkb9cmubBhFP-6UaRybmW5H7Eom6ev-PEANImPe51Q5L6ShbTh5322B73-4DDhVc-D7eJEJ7s9FK2QMUypgl6Mq49q6UEwP2q3e1Bl4bKTZMkGH5oakgGYGoKspsPPIHr1nEpCS7DsQfT612dQ-YAUk0ELTXSiU4DLHoBAZng6uQ-SXf3P9ExAEUg8J74BN9XKVGW-FmKY_UIVtrDOklYe2m6RdxIqFdKVfSMYnhOtmaX9768xt6YlNgLe6haRskutJTlNDnav-AtdweXWw2pY3CRboR0brT4OpC2tZsG4znAEWVGyTm6bSR3mR3fdyptW_GB68=&c=FpLdQSgEZ3BUqepFXWkr08s0orKvXmiewBiVdzUN8RBw4MaEg1vNQg==&ch=VceS7WO0oiJRwMOJtWF-Z1DQNPdiuRjsGylsuj77LJDhfzq2xrLcBw==)

body:
When voters learn the facts, they're breaking our way.
| Friend,
---
I told you the good news that our race is tied.
---
But now I have better news. One survey found that voters who know the full story of Cunningham's disgraceful affair are now voting for us by a 3-point margin!
---
There's just one problem. Many voters still do not know the full story, because Cunningham and Schumer are spending every last dollar in their accounts to bury it.
---

clean_body: Democrat Joe Cunningham is too liberal for the Lowcountry. He’s way out of step with our community and has failed to be an independent voice... Friend, Democrat Joe Cunningham is too liberal for the Lowcountry. He’s way out of step with our community and has failed to be an independent voice for our families, workers, and small businesses on Capitol Hill. We’re getting the truth out about Democrat Joe Cunningham, but we can’t do it alone — watch our ad below and donate any amount to help us keep it on the air. Just look at Democrat Joe Cunningham’s record: He supports Joe Biden’s tax hike, which would be the largest tax increase in history He put Parris Island on the chopping block, threatening 6,000 jobs and $700 million worth of economic impact * Votes with Nancy Pelosi 90% of the time Friend, Democrat Joe Cunningham’s liberal agenda is a disaster for the Lowcountry. But there’s a better choice at the ballot box — Nancy Mace. Nancy will continue to rebuild our military, cut our taxes, and get the Lowcountry back to work. - Thank you, Team Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Our FINAL End-of-Month goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great
body:
It's our FINAL End-of-Month goal before the Election. | It's
Trump vs. a Radical Democrat on the ballot, and we need to make
sure every Patriot is stepping up

Peter,

I don't email you often, so
you know this is critical.

The President asked me to
check in with you because our FINAL End-of-Month Deadline before
the Election is coming up and this is your LAST CHANCE to make an
impact.

It's Trump vs. a Radical
Democrat on the ballot, and we need to make sure every Patriot is
stepping up and doing their part to secure FOUR MORE YEARS.

Your support is so important
that he's authorized an impact increase of 925% until 11:59 PM
TONIGHT.

This is your LAST CHANCE to
step up and help President Trump secure VICTORY on Election Day.
He's asked me to let him know the moment that you make your
contribution, so don't wait.

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to help us CRUSH our End-of-Month Goal and to
increase your impact by 925%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2563

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1025

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $513

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $461

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

We need to pick up the
pace, Peter.

I'm going to call the Trump
Online Fundraising Team soon to get an update on who stepped up
today so I can report back to President Trump. I'll have no
choice but to tell him the truth, so make sure you contribute NOW
before it's too late.

Please contribute ANY
AMOUNT RIGHT NOW and YOUR NAME will be on the next report I give
President Trump.

Thank you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make

for all that you do!

name: Roger Misso
subject: Show Gil Cisneros that we have his back and HOLD THE HOUSE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. We are proud to endorse Navy veteran and education advocate [Gil Cisneros for re-election in California's 39th Congressional District](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/Hx370vfZkpbKpiatj8UEv8_Tq-MSdqpsuL7TBwRRX0A=) \- one of the tightest races in the country.

Gil is the son of a public school cafeteria worker and Vietnam veteran who found opportunity through a career in the Navy. As a first-generation college graduate, he is paying it forward as the founder of scholarship programs for underserved youth and advocate for stronger public school systems. And he's fighting for better healthcare, too - as the son of a veteran struggling with exposure to Agent Orange, he knows that it takes Congressional action - not just talk - to improve the lives of our veterans and neighbors.

Gil's opponent has endorsed Donald Trump and has signaled that she will vote to take healthcare away from millions of Americans, restrict a woman's right to choose, and continue tax cuts for billionaires while the rest of us struggle. We don't have time for that kind of failed agenda any longer.

That's why we need **_you._** We want to make sure Gil has what he needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/Hx370vfZkpbKpiatj8UEv8_Tq-MSdqpsuL7TBwRRX0A=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give Gil a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/Hx370vfZkpbKpiatj8UEv8_Tq-MSdqpsuL7TBwRRX0A=)

Thank you for your support. We must hold the House at all costs - and that means re-electing Gil to CA-39!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/voSOylBSl29lLre39H9mNLhN1Zp0kDr8I0ZMBQ6spAM=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/oFVtK-sc0TrlnlpYLG7iVEgSDB0NHdxMTgCn6ODIvGc=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/X-HCkfEdih4Aw0EcPyFl96CPVTS4q77AhMUHnplpIgA=/lPCFa1hkfFrlpuwFUFqkqe0bnb3zLnrbVjmQ6Owv-Yo=).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20890918/258752845/-1438587337?refcode=em_reactivation_2020.10.28_b4_ep_inactives-nd&refcode2=19c0162c-5019-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWMwMTYyYy01MDE5LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5k3if4DFRil49Q4Z5pwBK4GdhLbo7wIQsf3Ot5ArvI=) Friend,

---

Anthony and I went to games every week; he loved it. Because he had muscular dystrophy, I would carry him up the bleachers. It wasn’t easy, but Anthony was worth it.

Insurance companies didn’t think so -- they considered muscular dystrophy a pre-existing condition. Bills piled up, even after Anthony passed. **If my opponent has his way, too many families across South Central PA will be left in similar positions.**

**Friend, I won’t stand for it.** In Congress, I will _always_ fight to protect those with pre-existing conditions like my brother Anthony, and work to ensure quality, affordable health care for all.

**Friend, as voters make their decision about who they want to see represent them in Congress, I want them to see this ad and know that I will always fight for them.**[**But we still need to raise $68,833 by this Saturday in order to have the resources to keep this ad on the air and continue reaching voters through Election Day. clean_body: He wasn’t a pre-existing condition. He was Anthony. = Friend, We just launched our final TV ad of this election, and it’s about my brother Anthony. = = | = Anthony and I went to games every week; he loved it. Because he had muscular dystrophy, I would carry him up the bleachers. It wasn’t easy, but Anthony was worth it. Insurance companies didn’t think so -- they considered muscular dystrophy a pre-existing condition. Bills piled up, even after Anthony passed. If my opponent has his way, too many families across South Central PA will be left in similar positions. Friend, I won’t stand for it. In Congress, I will always fight to protect those with pre-existing conditions like my brother Anthony, and work to ensure quality, affordable health care for all. Friend, as voters make their decision about who they want to see represent them in Congress, I want them to see this ad and know that I will always fight for them.= = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Friend, Anthony’s story is deeply personal to me, and it’s a reminder of just what is at stake for hard-working Pennsylvania families in this election. In Congress, I will always fight on behalf of South Central PA and I’d appreciate anything you can give to help me get there. Thank you for everything you do to support this campaign, Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. name: Bill Olson
subject: How we win a very close race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

Hi Peter,

I'm about to prove that a Trump conservative can win in Florida- but I need your help to do it!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA
!

I'll cut right to the point- our race is tied. A dead heat.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

A recent local analysis of the race reveals why it's closing:

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Olson said, “This is not personal, but Congressman Soto can be the nicest guy in the world but it doesn’t matter because he doesn’t vote the way I believe people here in Central Florida believe,” Olson said. “He voted with Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC (Ocasio-Cortez), 93% of the time, and I don’t believe that ‘the Squad,’ that the people of Central Florida have that philosophy.”

Soto said his alignment with Pelosi on most House votes reflects his support for an agenda that includes raising wages, expanding access to health care and preserving the environment.

As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. Those contributors include the American Bankers Association, the League of Conservation Voters and Abbott Laboratories.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

This race will revolve around turnout- it's that simple. If we turn out Trump/Olson voters, we will win. If we do not, we will lose.

We have worked hard, and this race is closing fast! People don't want a Pelosi clone who votes with the Squad and is bought off by Swamp lobbyists!

They want a normal guy, a veteran, who has been getting things done for our country for decades!

We have one week. It's all about turnout here. Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

Trump is fighting for Florida, just as I'm fighting for my swing district. Helping me helps him- and we need the help right now!

My district is critical. Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hLhVchEA8F6OuRU&b=34iyMlVaZItIrGTJI9LVXA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Making Quality Healthcare More Affordable For Houston Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Houston is home to some of the greatest medical minds in the world, and
through responsible governance, we can increase the affordability of this
world-class care for Houston families and preserve the quality that makes
Houston a global standard-bearer in healthcare.

Improving our healthcare system isn't about politics; it's about ensuring our
friends and neighbors in Houston have access to the care they need at a price
they can afford. While Lizzie Fletcher supports a federal government takeover
of our healthcare, which will drive up costs and erode the quality of care,
Wesley is leading the way actionable solutions to increase the affordability of
our healthcare while encouraging growth and innovation.

As we continue to cope with the challenges of the coronavirus pandemic,
Wesley's leadership on healthcare will help Houston families recover and better
prepare for challenges in the future. Importantly, Wesley's plans revolve
around empowering medical professionals and patients--not the federal
government--to shape the future of our healthcare industry.

A few of Wesley's recommendations include:
* Increasing competition in the healthcare marketplace by forcing providers
to improve transparency and list their prices;
* Allowing insurance policy purchases across state lines to expand consumer
choice;
* Improving affordability within the pharmaceutical industry by breaking down
barriers to allow generic brands to compete in the market;
* And, facilitating research and development at the Congressional level.
Wesley recognizes that the Affordable Care Act brought a couple of positive
improvements to our healthcare industry, namely, allowing children to remain on
their parents' coverage and guaranteeing coverage for patients with
pre-existing conditions. Wesley fully supports integrating these two positive
elements into our future healthcare plans.

Wesley's proposals to improve our healthcare system draw a sharp contrast to
Fletcher's, which include expanding government-run healthcare and instituting a
public option. Under Fletcher's public option, which would cost taxpayers over
$1 trillion, more than 100,000 Americans would lose their existing coverage,
private insurance would be pushed to the brink of destruction, and
employer-sponsored healthcare would cease to exist. Furthermore, Fletcher's
plan would undermine Medicare recipients and threaten access to care for
millions of seniors.

Fletcher is not the healthcare advocate that Houston families need.

As you prepare to cast your vote, we hope you will keep in mind that there is
only one candidate on the ballot who has proposed viable solutions to the
shortcomings of our healthcare system. Wesley will make it easier for Houston
families to afford the care they need and simultaneously create an environment
in which our healthcare industry can continue to lead the way in innovation
worldwide.

Wesley Hunt is the best candidate to lead our city forward.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=4f93ce6077964f3e9faee9e5a3f4629f&_t=Nf5mvDCEmfroNKLPV80m9CRflGiWiMRpSKEiS5u4lnS9wCr7pxFiEU4ebgGAEHL6LdJPvGvhNuwkpXcDteE259lWiT4gFXB_Lqo9xm-LqvW_2PQJhHSr8Gf-YjgYK7Wfw_gp_PnuLTp6i9Qcyid_vuAZ9Cb4kGLWcBK9j9guXMA%3D>
.

name: Team Inslee
subject: After 2016, election predictions are meaningless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We just don't know.
| Friend, Predicting any election after 2016 is just plain old fortune telling. Maybe we've got Halloween on the brain, but none of the tea leaves, the tarot cards, or the crystal balls predicted Donald Trump winning in 2016. We can't trust anything that says a win is guaranteed because it's not. **We run like we're down. We run like we're losing. Because we won't know if we are until _every last vote_ is counted. That's what this week is all about: [Our FINAL fundraising deadline is on Halloween, and we need to raise $75,000 by then for the final push of this election. Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13456?t=3&akid=8204%2E868730%2Es8kNzp)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13457?t=4&akid=8204%2E868730%2Es8kNzp)

Friend,
Our final fundraising deadline of this election is coming up this weekend.
**[I'm going to humbly ask that you chip in $5 or whatever you can ahead of that deadline -- because it matters.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13456?t=12&akid=8204%2E868730%2Es8kNzp)**

Here's why:
In October 2016, Hillary Clinton led Donald Trump by 14 points in the polls. Everyone thought it was wrapped up, over, done -- we know now how wrong we all were.
My opponent is just like Donald Trump: unpredictable, extreme, offensive. We cannot let polls, assumptions, beliefs, or anything like that lead us right now because we can never ever be sure of an election result until every vote is counted.
2016 taught us an important lesson: We run out the clock, and we fight for every vote assuming we're down 14 points. We don't take anything for granted, and we continue to fight for every single vote. That's what we're going to do this week because we shouldn't assume this race is safe.
**We set a FINAL fundraising goal of $75,000 by midnight on Halloween -- we won't be spooked out of it by anything.[Donate $5 or more right now to fight for every last vote alongside me.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13456?t=19&akid=8204%2E868730%2Es8kNzp)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

That's what this week is all about: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Team Inslee \--- Original Message --- From: Jay Inslee Date: Tue, Oct 27, 2020 Subject: What 2016 taught us. Friend, Our final fundraising deadline of this election is coming up this weekend. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Here's why: In October 2016, Hillary Clinton led Donald Trump by 14 points in the polls. Everyone thought it was wrapped up, over, done -- we know now how wrong we all were. My opponent is just like Donald Trump: unpredictable, extreme, offensive. We cannot let polls, assumptions, beliefs, or anything like that lead us right now because we can never ever be sure of an election result until every vote is counted. 2016 taught us an important lesson: We run out the clock, and we fight for every vote assuming we're down 14 points. We don't take anything for granted, and we continue to fight for every single vote. That's what we're going to do this week because we shouldn't assume this race is safe. We set a FINAL fundraising goal of $75,000 by midnight on Halloween -- we won't be spooked out of it by anything. Very truly yours, Jay

And to guarantee their unconstitutional schemes don't get checked in the Courts, they plan to pack the Supreme Court with liberal activists. We can't let them win! New Mexico, I need you! Ben Ray Lujan is relying on Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi to fund his campaign, while I'm grateful to be receiving 90% of my campaign contributions from people like you in New Mexico. Pete Sessions has the answers on how to live the high life (without actually paying for it). **Do you think it’s too expensive to join “One of the most exclusive” golf clubs in Maryland?** _Don't worry! Have the campaign PAC pay the $20,000 membership fee._ **Do you feel like spending $225,640 at a ”swanky ski resort” in Utah but don’t have the cash?** _Pete has the answer! Let the campaign PAC pay for it._ **Did you rack up a $5,319 bill at a New York steakhouse with a few of your friends ?** _Don’t worry about it! Have the campaign PAC pay for it._ __**And that’s exactly what Pete will be doing if he wins.**__ **We can’t let Pete Sessions use his privilege in Congress to fund his social life. name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: the brake lines were cut…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |

This headline chilled me to the bone. Talk of defunding the police hasn't calmed down. Violence still plagues our streets. [ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=4f7cbe1a8a6a4265ab8d6040e5de6bd8&_e=bTaVAENqKs8mDuYnewMVcU5vo5VTW2k7iw4EevOP5DGy8Bj3HTOERPAWCp07Vb69O3jTlYvyBOa9p4dQEkgwJjpUOdkNDo81Fzf3OBpjNIDsR2dsuXYbLLgU3u3ZjNh6i5b06l951O54jOwHQlu-nIj38mWlwF-RSlj5hwSieCDr49XHXxK1Uuf7HDPvu6dm_phUQeZSeKulJdEQOdCEXF13NQ4DCtm2nyyc5arTaWhKLRGb1FwsL8lN_ND_vufB8B9OZafKIaSqy0qU4VuUh3ry8okhM7aTKppuR8i3EL0gZ2Yxtn2YqMtHULwCJyhf-RcY44ZIBgrQw7lD_nP5lYmdrQwMRXGk8Lnr61cIw1AmmJoi1GPyYgorLLecvhb5RYv_Y8yDa4STfc4GVbObkgr2W-WWvItO-Xsn4EY92ZDgTFtNUFWzkOspIQDwClXc) **_We must send a message that this is unacceptable._**

Peter, that’s not good enough for Long Island. That’s not good enough for our police forces.

name: Governor Kristi Noem
subject: President Trump endorses Jerry Carl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
We will lose the House if we lose this race. Read more >>>
Fellow Conservative, I know I don’t need to tell you how important it is that we flip the House this November and give President Trump the support he needs. The only way we’re going to be able to do that and Keep America Great is by electing commonsense conservatives like Jerry Carl. **Jerry is running for the Congress in Alabama’s first district, and he needs your help! subject: ‘New Border Wall Is Getting Results’
body:
The border has physically changed as a result of the Trump administration’s decision to fund projects along the 2,000-mile dividing line between... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe58882932&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘New Border Wall Is Getting Results’**

“The border has physically changed as a result of the Trump administration’s decision to fund projects along the 2,000-mile dividing line” between Mexico and the United States, Anna Giaritelli reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Years of labor is overwhelmingly evident and compelling. The wall is up, everywhere.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c6cf7ea92&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**There Really Has Been a ‘Trump Effect’ on Immigration**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d097071fe5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In Philadelphia this week, “rioters threw stones and bricks, and some 30 officers sustained injuries. The agitators looted businesses, and officers arrested 91 people, including three for assaulting police and 76 for burglary . . . After unrest this summer, the [Philadelphia] City Council reduced police funding by more than $33 million,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2917e762f&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Under President Trump’s leadership, [America] achieved energy independence and energy dominance, becoming the world’s largest producer of oil and natural gas . . . This achievement has had a profound effect on our economy, in the form of jobs and affordable energy,” Energy Secretary Dan Brouillette writes in the [_Midland Reporter-Telegram_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fb1edbc11&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| How does America’s economy today compare to our country under President Obama? “The sluggish first five months of the Obama-Biden recovery led to the slowest recovery in U.S. history,” financial expert Douglas Carr writes. “The Trump administration’s first five months of recovery are the nation’s fastest ever.” Read more in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff6337f2c6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | Friend, I kept my word. Last week, I showed up for the debate for Texas’ 7th Congressional District. But our current Democrat representative didn’t have the courage or respect for her constituents to show up and face questions from the public. I stood next to an empty chair. Lizzie Fletcher is not a representative, but a puppet for Nancy Pelosi. She knows that she can’t answer questions on ending the oil and gas industry or defunding the police, so she’s hiding. Lizzie Fletcher thinks she can hide from voters and still win reelection. Let’s prove her wrong. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Amy McGrath
subject: I need your support to defeat McConnell.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We can win this race. Independent polling shows that I'm within one point of beating Mitch McConnell. And two internal polls we released show the race is virtually tied.
Hi there,
I'm running for the U.S. Senate against Sen. Mitch McConnell. And I need your help.
Defeating McConnell won't be easy, but I'm up to the challenge. I served 20 years in the Marines, flew 89 combat missions in Iraq and Afghanistan, and overcame the odds to become the first woman Marine to fly a combat mission in an F/A-18 fighter jet.
We can win this race. Independent polling shows that I'm within one point of beating him. And two internal polls we released show the race is virtually tied.
**But McConnell has already built up a massive $16.6 million war chest and he's flooding the airwaves with vicious attack ads and smears against me.**
I'll need your support right now to run the campaign it will take to defeat him.
[**So I'm humbly asking you -- will you split a $3 donation between my campaign and Senator Maggie Hassan's to help me defeat McConnell? Your donation will be put to work immediately.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc62a/2a380d31/20550ce9/f04475/2564136502/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDI4X213aDRtY2dyYXRoX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20201028_mwh4mcgrath_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
When I was 13, I dreamed of becoming a fighter pilot, but women weren't allowed to serve in combat roles in our military. So I wrote to my elected officials to ask them to change the law. I never heard back from my senator -- McConnell. He wasn't listening then, and he's not listening now.
Kentuckians want a senator who will improve health care and protect Social Security and Medicare. But McConnell tried to rip health care away from Kentuckians, including those with pre-existing conditions. And to top it all off, he recently announced his plan to slash Medicare and Social Security, after his massive tax cuts for the top 1%.
Folks around here know McConnell isn't listening, and they're ready for a change. But I'll need your help to make it happen.
[**Please, will you split a $3 donation to support my campaign and Maggie's? Together, we can flip the Senate and defeat Mitch McConnell once and for all.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc62a/2a380d31/20550ce9/f04475/2564136502/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDI4X213aDRtY2dyYXRoX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20201028_mwh4mcgrath_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc62a/2a380d31/20550ce9/f04476/2564136502/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDI4X213aDRtY2dyYXRoX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20201028_mwh4mcgrath_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b209754/95697233/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b209755/95697233/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b20974a/95697233/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b209756/95697233/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b209750/95697233/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd71/18e32a7f/4b479e18/7b20974b/95697233/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

Derek --

**This is the last end-of-month fundraising deadline of this campaign, and the stakes are high.** This is our final chance to mobilize Virginia voters to make sure that we keep the Commonwealth blue on Election Day by electing Democrats up and down the ticket.

**[If you have the means, will you help us meet our fundraising goal before the end of the month?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e5/53d9897e/556b7e3b/1c88c952/3595693245/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-last?refcode=20201028_f_2_nd__914__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Our team is working hard to make sure that we turn out as many voters as possible and elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Mark Warner, and all of our wonderful Congressional candidates. Whether America is able to move toward true equality in the years to come depends on the outcome of the election on November 3rd. **Whether Mark Warner stays in the Senate fighting for us, or is replaced by a rubber stamp for the Trump Administration 's dangerous agenda depends on how we vote _now_.**

Derek, there are only **six days until Election Day** , and to make sure we keep the Commonwealth blue, we're going to need all hands on deck. That starts with re-electing Mark Warner, so he can continue to defend the progress we've made in Virginia.

**Will you pitch in to help us to meet our last fundraising goal and reach as many voters as possible?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: The time is NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
The election is just a few days away. There is still so much to be done between now and when the ballot boxes close on Tuesday, but fname, the time is Peter, The election is just a few days away. There is still so much to be done between now and when the ballot boxes close on Tuesday, but Peter, the time is now to get out and vote to restore Conservative values in PA-07.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b3/77d4c309/222da66c/2635b6c3/2941836767/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b3/77d4c309/222da66c/2635b6c2/2941836767/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b3/77d4c309/222da66c/2635b6cd/2941836767/VEsHAg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

clean_body: Peter, I have news: | | | Donald Trump just flew into my district. And my opponent Don Bacon was just declared the MOST VULNERABLE incumbent in Congress. I'm now hearing that not only did he get on stage with Trump -- he's BEGGING big GOP donors to rush him cash. "" I refuse to let that happen. "" "" \-- Onstage, Trump and Bacon rallied their base with disgusting lies \-- Behind the scenes, I am calling for a surge of donations from my supporters that will have FIVE TIMES the impact \-- I'm going to shock Bacon by raising $16,790 and hand him a HUMILIATING defeat. "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you, Kara | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, "" Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, "" We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, "" We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support! 7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132 info@eastmanforcongress.com | | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Why I am running for Congress
body:
I need you on my team
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s2GdzZYXli8h3I6YReUXgNz7rF63f6HzBlPnsq8Fnkjd-Xgz0fJfSCKMFRHkOSm9SLm0ej9w_Okn8hciYgzy9uyCD_kYUscY9zXAaHDvAJehBHMgzYjopo-7xmUa_tVOzswQ3rOpCUxopUl9FD3bPZZv8aNwOipCG7LCHpZnxcBrFsyAaqp7f4KLll57z5E-&c=UaRWl3aMOzVum68MrnqbW7FDWjda5QRlXjjYlwehgtvhBrINmA887Q==&ch=rEMjP0JpxUKuNe15gkQrhVvMgJ827b_R9bIS_YkRFr2FiZdDur19jQ==)

| Patriot,
As we get into this last stretch before Election Day, I wanted to take a moment to share with you why I'm running for Congress.
When Obama was president, one of his failed programs resulted in my family losing our beloved cattle ranch. This was devastating for us, and a perfect example of liberals intruding on the lives of everyday Americans.
But these days, far-left politicians have only been ramping up their rhetoric and socialist policies. They've been openly talking about having the government completely overhaul our healthcare, raising our taxes, and implementing their socialist ideas.
In fact, [the VP of the same administration that stripped my family of our ranch is now running for President to pick up on this Big Government intrusion!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s2GdzZYXli8h3I6YReUXgNz7rF63f6HzBlPnsq8Fnkjd-Xgz0fJfSCKMFRHkOSm9SLm0ej9w_Okn8hciYgzy9uyCD_kYUscY9zXAaHDvAJehBHMgzYjopo-7xmUa_tVOzswQ3rOpCUxopUl9FD3bPZZv8aNwOipCG7LCHpZnxcBrFsyAaqp7f4KLll57z5E-&c=UaRWl3aMOzVum68MrnqbW7FDWjda5QRlXjjYlwehgtvhBrINmA887Q==&ch=rEMjP0JpxUKuNe15gkQrhVvMgJ827b_R9bIS_YkRFr2FiZdDur19jQ==)

| | | [STAND FOR FREEDOM IN 2020](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s2GdzZYXli8h3I6YReUXgNz7rF63f6HzBlPnsq8Fnkjd-Xgz0fJfSCKMFRHkOSm9SLm0ej9w_Okn8hciYgzy9uyCD_kYUscY9zXAaHDvAJehBHMgzYjopo-7xmUa_tVOzswQ3rOpCUxopUl9FD3bPZZv8aNwOipCG7LCHpZnxcBrFsyAaqp7f4KLll57z5E-&c=UaRWl3aMOzVum68MrnqbW7FDWjda5QRlXjjYlwehgtvhBrINmA887Q==&ch=rEMjP0JpxUKuNe15gkQrhVvMgJ827b_R9bIS_YkRFr2FiZdDur19jQ==)
---
| President Trump has done an incredible job so far fighting for our civil liberties, in addition to improving care for veterans and working to fix our broken immigration system. He needs strong conservative voices to back him up and help him Keep America Great.
I am running for Congress to help President Trump do just that. My mission is to ensure our economy grows stronger than ever, drain the swamp, help our working families, and protect our Second Amendment rights.
I need your help in this last stretch of election season to make sure we build on the President's accomplishments.
[If you can pitch in to help my run for Congress](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s2GdzZYXli8h3I6YReUXgNz7rF63f6HzBlPnsq8Fnkjd-Xgz0fJfSCKMFRHkOSm9SLm0ej9w_Okn8hciYgzy9uyCD_kYUscY9zXAaHDvAJehBHMgzYjopo-7xmUa_tVOzswQ3rOpCUxopUl9FD3bPZZv8aNwOipCG7LCHpZnxcBrFsyAaqp7f4KLll57z5E-&c=UaRWl3aMOzVum68MrnqbW7FDWjda5QRlXjjYlwehgtvhBrINmA887Q==&ch=rEMjP0JpxUKuNe15gkQrhVvMgJ827b_R9bIS_YkRFr2FiZdDur19jQ==), I can go to work being President Trump's ally here in Florida and making sure Big Government liberals like Joe Biden don't tread on your freedom!

clean_body: I need you on my team | | | | | | == | Patriot, As we get into this last stretch before Election Day, I wanted to take a moment to share with you why I'm running for Congress. When Obama was president, one of his failed programs resulted in my family losing our beloved cattle ranch. This was devastating for us, and a perfect example of liberals intruding on the lives of everyday Americans. But these days, far-left politicians have only been ramping up their rhetoric and socialist policies. They've been openly talking about having the government completely overhaul our healthcare, raising our taxes, and implementing their socialist ideas. In fact, == | | | == | President Trump has done an incredible job so far fighting for our civil liberties, in addition to improving care for veterans and working to fix our broken immigration system. He needs strong conservative voices to back him up and help him Keep America Great. I am running for Congress to help President Trump do just that. My mission is to ensure our economy grows stronger than ever, drain the swamp, help our working families, and protect our Second Amendment rights. I need your help in this last stretch of election season to make sure we build on the President's accomplishments. ==, I can go to work being President Trump's ally here in Florida and making sure Big Government liberals like Joe Biden don't tread on your freedom! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for supporting my campaign, | == | Kat Cammack Republican Nominee for Congress, FL-03 | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yL7algs_k_9WAl6J3ilhwXOw2LDK4ncx46Qwa9Lb8j0=/D_VV9tCUtxeGNwZu5cJd7MLUoAp5raQ2j8bLQcYnu6Y=)
Thirty-two years in the making, but the Dodgers have **finally** won the World Series!! They put in the _work_ and got the job **done**. It's the Southern California way!
Now, we've got just six days to get _our_ job done. We're facing down the election of a _lifetime_ and we need to **step up to the plate.**
[**So, will you chip in $10 right now to make sure I can keep going to bat for the working families of CA-38?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yL7algs_k_9WAl6J3ilhwXOw2LDK4ncx46Qwa9Lb8j0=/BIxCzFYZffaUvNmYJO8bo5hDoD3_m3HWM1E6M8rhrj4=?refcode=X_102820_DodgersWin)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yL7algs_k_9WAl6J3ilhwXOw2LDK4ncx46Qwa9Lb8j0=/BIxCzFYZffaUvNmYJO8bo5hDoD3_m3HWM1E6M8rhrj4=?refcode=X_102820_DodgersWin)
If there's anything the Dodgers proved at the bottom of the sixth last night, it's that you _never_ give up fighting.
That's why we've got to give it our all _right now_. Let's make sure we have **no** regrets when we wake up on November 4th!
**[Please donate whatever you can right now to help send me back to Congress and keep Southern California blue>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/yL7algs_k_9WAl6J3ilhwXOw2LDK4ncx46Qwa9Lb8j0=/MUIXP8nafzUwej3y6bLKowMFRUD5oZ5Ae0QkfT7RupY=?refcode=X_102820_DodgersWin)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yL7algs_k_9WAl6J3ilhwXOw2LDK4ncx46Qwa9Lb8j0=/MUIXP8nafzUwej3y6bLKowMFRUD5oZ5Ae0QkfT7RupY=?refcode=X_102820_DodgersWin)
Thank you and go Dodgers!!
_\-- Linda S anchez_

body:
| | | Derek, For our final fundraising push of the election, we set an ambitious $20,000 goal yesterday -- and as of right now, we’re coming up short. Like _very_ short. The truth is every penny matters right now, Derek. Every dollar donated will help Virginia Democrats get out the vote in these final six days of the election. **[Please be one of the donors we need to step up and help us hit this $20,000 goal as soon as possible. name: Marco Rubio
subject: RSVP to be a Charter Member
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==) Dear Friend, I'll come right to the point. I came to Washington as part of the 2010 wave and then won re-election in the historic 2016 election that elevated Donald Trump to the White House... so I've seen a lot. But the Left's ongoing abuse of power beats all and, left unchecked, will destroy everything you and I stand for. **[That's why today, I'm urgently asking for your help to defend the future of our great country.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==)** **FACT:** first, liberals in the Obama administration weaponized the IRS to target conservatives; **FACT:** these same liberals then weaponized the courts and the heavily-entrenched federal bureaucracy to block the Trump administration at every turn; **FACT:** next, these liberals weaponized the U.S. Constitution, specifically the impeachment process, in a flimsy attempt to reverse the outcome of the 2016 election; and **FACT:** they're not done... they're just getting started... The Democrats, the radical Left, and their allies in the federal bureaucracy and mainstream media will stop at nothing to tighten their grip on power --- even threatening to "pack the Supreme Court, kill the filibuster, and end the Electoral College." They've got the U.S. House... and they desperately want the U.S. Senate. To realize this objective, they've set their sights on defeating conservatives in swing-states --- **which makes me their #1 target.** An anti-Trump group is dropping nearly $500,000 in ads against me already! That's why I ordered my campaign to immediately launch this **Charter Member** program to lay the foundation for what will most certainly be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. What does it mean to be a Charter Member? Well, for starters, it means that you are the first to answer the call - to stand by my side when it matters the most. It also means that you are willing to serve as a critical sounding-board for me and for my campaign --- which is why I hope you'll allow me to stay in regular communication and ask you to share your opinion and insights from time to time. Lastly, it means that you don't just _talk-the-talk_ , but that you are a conservative willing to _walk-the-walk_ by **[rushing an emergency, one-time contribution of $35 to my campaign headquarters in the next 48 hours.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==)** _The 2018 Florida Senate race cost over $200 million._ Democrats and their dark-money allies poured everything they had into that race, but Republicans held on to win by a razor-thin margin (10,033 out of over 8 million votes cast). This is the kind of 10-round, knock-down, drag-out fight you and I must fight. I don't say "prepare to fight" or "expect to fight"... ... I say "fight" because we're knee-deep in it already. You see, Florida is such a pivotal state on the electoral map (both this year and two years from now, when I'm on the ballot), that the Democrats are in permanent campaign mode here. They are already attacking me and fine-tuning their campaign machine. And recent history proves that the radical Left will stop at nothing to take power --- their ambition knows no bounds. Their ultimate goal is to enshrine an agenda that is beyond extreme. This is what it means to be a Democrat: ***** Embracing socialism** *****Advocating for infanticide** *****Smashing the rule-of-law via wide-open borders and sanctuary cities** *****Tearing down institutions like the Supreme Court (adding seats to "pack" it with liberals); the Electoral College (replacing it with a national popular vote), and the 1st Amendment (cracking down on conservative speech on social media, on campus, and in businesses owned by persons of faith)** Enough. This agenda is beyond dangerous. And, this agenda is exactly what we'll get, if Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies take control of the U.S. Senate. Make no mistake, this threatens to fundamentally alter our nation and reverse all that we as conservatives stand for and have fought too hard to achieve. So much is at stake. And it's no exaggeration to say the outcome of the Democrats' power-grab will be determined by what happens right here in Florida this year... and two years from now... and two years from then... and so on. **[That's why I hope you'll accept my offer to become a Charter Member and send a generous contribution of $35 to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==)** I value your input and I genuinely need to hear from you today. With you on my team, I'm confident we can engage and triumph in this long battle to stop the Democrats from taking back this Senate seat. Don't forget... as I write this, they're at it already. So if you can send more than $35 --- **[say $50, $75, $125, $500, $1,000 or even the FEC "max" of $2,800](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==)** - it would come as a tremendous blessing. The most important thing is that you respond today. I also want you to know how much I appreciate you taking the time to read my letter today and, even more so, I want to express my deep gratitude to you for being the first to answer the call to stand with me now, when I need you the most. You can count on me to continue leading the fight for our conservative, Republican principles in the U.S. Senate. In fact, having you as a Charter Member of my re-election campaign means I can continue focusing 110% on the fight at hand --- especially when it comes to exposing and stamping out the Democrats' on-going abuse of power. Again, thank you. Lets win this. Sincerely, Sen. Marco Rubio [_** BECOME A CHARTER MEMBER NOW >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==) P.S. Ronald Reagan often spoke of a "time for choosing". My friend, this is it. The lines have been drawn. In consider us blessed --- you and me --- to be given this opportunity to fight for the country we so love. **[Please, let me know if I can count on you to join this important fight by rushing a gift of $35 right now.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==)** [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qN93YjAXtNMoUrsdf_JD_oasuDeaZUZmuxZQ3LIA5-Na6NPs5BjVFWEFkWQqEBfDU3XGuRy-7irXFAMZo-AYRtA9luK0gijBdheN6cH_nCcrYLEANNmfA5lPvGn6SMHsvwG2GvzuoHLiYCE5iiCgrIXjP4gI37JKyKO1PWpM5XFIEhV1NpE0klxqzP4mCQRZIBG0T-UabMf43wZT9Z20o7Rkkh4fY82DV4MfIcxvuk6TU9Do2WFDEQ==&c=6x2ZqePE1FQrtojUEfSH2i3ZyOFWtDzrB09UH3CGW9PLcMNzH5NQKg==&ch=sMy6kc1jpc1DrDxc_FN9tDSQFHeRDy1aisuvCGzPgXonsKKtT9mwAA==) Paid for and authorized by Marco Rubio for Senate.

clean_body: == Dear Friend, I'll come right to the point. I came to Washington as part of the 2010 wave and then won re-election in the historic 2016 election that elevated Donald Trump to the White House... so I've seen a lot. But the Left's ongoing abuse of power beats all and, left unchecked, will destroy everything you and I stand for. == FACT: first, liberals in the Obama administration weaponized the IRS to target conservatives; FACT: these same liberals then weaponized the courts and the heavily-entrenched federal bureaucracy to block the Trump administration at every turn; FACT: next, these liberals weaponized the U.S. Constitution, specifically the impeachment process, in a flimsy attempt to reverse the outcome of the 2016 election; and FACT: they're not done... they're just getting started... The Democrats, the radical Left, and their allies in the federal bureaucracy and mainstream media will stop at nothing to tighten their grip on power --- even threatening to "pack the Supreme Court, kill the filibuster, and end the Electoral College." They've got the U.S. House... and they desperately want the U.S. Senate. To realize this objective, they've set their sights on defeating conservatives in swing-states --- which makes me their #1 target. An anti-Trump group is dropping nearly $500,000 in ads against me already! That's why I ordered my campaign to immediately launch this Charter Member program to lay the foundation for what will most certainly be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. What does it mean to be a Charter Member? Well, for starters, it means that you are the first to answer the call - to stand by my side when it matters the most. It also means that you are willing to serve as a critical sounding-board for me and for my campaign --- which is why I hope you'll allow me to stay in regular communication and ask you to share your opinion and insights from time to time. Lastly, it means that you don't just talk-the-talk , but that you are a conservative willing to walk-the-walk by == The 2018 Florida Senate race cost over $200 million. Democrats and their dark-money allies poured everything they had into that race, but Republicans held on to win by a razor-thin margin (10,033 out of over 8 million votes cast). This is the kind of 10-round, knock-down, drag-out fight you and I must fight. I don't say "prepare to fight" or "expect to fight"... ... I say "fight" because we're knee-deep in it already. You see, Florida is such a pivotal state on the electoral map (both this year and two years from now, when I'm on the ballot), that the Democrats are in permanent campaign mode here. They are already attacking me and fine-tuning their campaign machine. And recent history proves that the radical Left will stop at nothing to take power --- their ambition knows no bounds. Their ultimate goal is to enshrine an agenda that is beyond extreme. This is what it means to be a Democrat: *** Embracing socialism ***Advocating for infanticide ***Smashing the rule-of-law via wide-open borders and sanctuary cities ***Tearing down institutions like the Supreme Court (adding seats to "pack" it with liberals); the Electoral College (replacing it with a national popular vote), and the 1st Amendment (cracking down on conservative speech on social media, on campus, and in businesses owned by persons of faith) Enough. This agenda is beyond dangerous. And, this agenda is exactly what we'll get, if Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies take control of the U.S. Senate. Make no mistake, this threatens to fundamentally alter our nation and reverse all that we as conservatives stand for and have fought too hard to achieve. So much is at stake. And it's no exaggeration to say the outcome of the Democrats' power-grab will be determined by what happens right here in Florida this year... and two years from now... and two years from then... and so on. == I value your input and I genuinely need to hear from you today. With you on my team, I'm confident we can engage and triumph in this long battle to stop the Democrats from taking back this Senate seat. Don't forget... as I write this, they're at it already. So if you can send more than $35 --- == - it would come as a tremendous blessing. The most important thing is that you respond today. I also want you to know how much I appreciate you taking the time to read my letter today and, even more so, I want to express my deep gratitude to you for being the first to answer the call to stand with me now, when I need you the most. You can count on me to continue leading the fight for our conservative, Republican principles in the U.S. Senate. In fact, having you as a Charter Member of my re-election campaign means I can continue focusing 110% on the fight at hand --- especially when it comes to exposing and stamping out the Democrats' on-going abuse of power. Again, thank you. Lets win this. Sincerely, Sen. Marco Rubio == P.S. Ronald Reagan often spoke of a "time for choosing". My friend, this is it. The lines have been drawn. In consider us blessed --- you and me --- to be given this opportunity to fight for the country we so love. == == Paid for and authorized by Marco Rubio for Senate. P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 | | Marco Rubio for Senate | 228 S WASHINGTON ST STE 115, ALEXANDRIA, VA 22314 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Hackett?=
subject: TONIGHT: Indiana Second Congressional District Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Giving voters the chance to hear and weigh the clear difference between candidates is critical. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b0d71020ed&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=68b60241bd&e=5886ca081d)
---
|

Dear Friend,

**The day we’ve been waiting for is here.** Tonight at 7:00 p.m. EDT, Pat will take on Jackie in the Indiana Second Congressional District Debate!
[**No matter When, Where, or How, Pat is ready to stand up for Dignity and Justice for All of Indiana’s 2nd District**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b21b59e3bf&e=5886ca081d)
We have been asking for this debate for months. The Debate Commission asked both campaigns to debate before early voting started. Pat readily agreed, **Jackie refused.** More than 120,000 people in our District have already cast their vote. Jackie is scared that voters will change their mind once they see the difference between Pat and Jackie. We believe giving voters the chance to hear and weigh the clear differences between candidates is critical. Jackie robbed the early voters in this district of that opportunity, but this fight is not over until the polls close on Election Day.

---
| [NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=80aff4060b&e=5886ca081d "NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY")
---
|
The Debate Commission finalized a new date at the end of early voting and went through extraordinary lengths to ensure the debate could be held in the studio with all CDC guidelines in place. Once again, **Jackie refused** to debate in the studio despite the extraordinary safety measures. Jackie, who has been seen gallivanting around the District with no mask all the while wrapping her arms around senior citizens and toddlers, claims to be nervous about standing inside a large, open-spaced television studio following all CDC guidelines to debate Pat.

---
| [NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d84aca2bd9&e=5886ca081d "NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY")
---
|
IUSB was the next site proposed for neutrality and consistent location and backgrounds. Each candidate would be in a separate room with all CDC guidelines in place. Again, Pat Hackett readily agreed.**Jackie refused.** Jackie insisted on debating only from her office. Pat agreed to this condition, and both Pat and Jackie agreed to debate from their respective offices while sitting behind their desks.

Just 24 hours out from the debate, our campaign learned **Jackie refused** to sit behind a desk as she agreed to in the contract. In breach of her signed agreement, she will position herself behind a podium. Pat will honor her word and agreement of the contract and stay seated behind her desk.

---
| [NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=28b479c28b&e=5886ca081d "NO MATTER WHEN, WHERE, OR HOW, PAT IS READY")
---
|
The debate will be broadcast live at 7:00 p.m. EDT on WSBT, WNDU, ABC57, WNIT and WVPE. [We hope you can tune in to hear Pat outline her ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2b86a5929c&e=5886ca081d)[plan to bring the voice of the people back to Washington and find Dignity and Justice for All. ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d7ff66f050&e=5886ca081d)

Ahead of tonight’s debate, we express our sincere gratitude to all the sponsors involved in making this debate possible: The League of Women Voters (LWV) of the South Bend Area, LWV of LaPorte County, LWV of Elkhart County, the American Democracy Project at Indiana University South Bend, WSBT, WNDU, ABC57, WNIT and WVPE.

We’re thankful the time has come to show the voters of IN02 how Pat and Jackie have two vastly different understandings of what it means to be a congresswoman. **Join us tonight, as Pat finally holds Jackie accountable for her record in Congress.**

Team Hackett
---
|
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2dccfdaf40&e=5886ca081d)
---
[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5831d06581&e=5886ca081d)

---

---

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---
| Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066
[Add us to your address book](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8f9c8d9378)

subject: How we defeat the Swamp Monster:
body:

Defeating Lois Frankel is the first step in gutting the far-left... and saving the United States of America.

We have just 6 days to make it happen. [**Will you help me crush her on Election Day by pitching in $10, $25, or even $50?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-399549-940638-5267871-f465b86920-dd4fdfa538)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

subject: Fwd: The clock is winding down!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw the email we sent out yesterday. We are looking for volunteers willing to participate in our "full-court press" as....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/fwd-the-clock-is-winding-down?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Friends,

I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important email that we sent you yesterday.

This is it. The clock’s winding down. We’re making a full-court press across the state talking with voters on why it’s critical that we elect Republicans up and down the ballot. We’re making record numbers of phone calls, and we’re safely going door to door.

We want to pass you the ball. Are you ready?

Check out the email below, and sign-up now (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSed1LLZbO8iIdx6r_jnSsR5thRhNG-zfs_ZmWM8ZE9T-zo-1g/viewform?iterable_campaign=1625371&iterable_template=2244298&mc_cid=e4e974cce7&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

___

From: Indiana Republican Party
Date: October 27, 2020 at 9:28 a.m.
Subject: The clock is winding down!
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSed1LLZbO8iIdx6r_jnSsR5thRhNG-zfs_ZmWM8ZE9T-zo-1g/viewform?iterable_campaign=1625371&iterable_template=2244298&mc_cid=e4e974cce7&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Hoosier Republican,

The clock is winding down, Election Day is one week away, and we need you now!

With the buzzer about to go off, we need the whole team on the court for a full-court press. Don't "drop the ball" on getting involved in this crucial election.

Although the election is just seven short days away, there is still time to get involved and volunteer! You can make calls from home, safely knock doors in your neighborhood, or get connected with other grassroots ways to make a difference.

If you're interested in helping us finish strong, click the button below (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSed1LLZbO8iIdx6r_jnSsR5thRhNG-zfs_ZmWM8ZE9T-zo-1g/viewform?iterable_campaign=1625371&iterable_template=2244298&mc_cid=e4e974cce7&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to sign up, and we’ll be in touch.

-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

Click here to Volunteer! (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSed1LLZbO8iIdx6r_jnSsR5thRhNG-zfs_ZmWM8ZE9T-zo-1g/viewform?iterable_campaign=1625371&iterable_template=2244298&mc_cid=e4e974cce7&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3e1bf14612&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

subject: Did you mail your ballot yesterday?

body:
**Yesterday was the USPS-suggested deadline to mail your ballot to ensure you met your state 's voting deadline.** We encourage you to drop off your ballot at the election board, or to vote early in-person. [**If you live in Maricopa County, you can look up where to drop your ballot off here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kK3RC2H_fi-3ywXTR9z0YNjeujLd4Y0Anygrj1hV2_8=/ZGLB9qCYk0zEGntFJx63Sgf_Yr79Ii9NhvQikzrWyWw=)

**Have you already had a chance to mail your ballot? Don 't wait to make your voice heard!**

[**__**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kK3RC2H_fi-3ywXTR9z0YNjeujLd4Y0Anygrj1hV2_8=/gb5oJx5ugQrA2p6pkUhSiqk0bFDBnWV4r1trF0OYWSQ=?refcode=X_102720_VBM_A)

If you've already mailed or stopped by a ballot dropbox to make your vote, consider chipping in to help us reach more prospective voters! No donation is too small, and every contribution is appreciated. Together, we can make a difference by turning Arizona blue this November. Thank you for your continued support for Greg!

[**Can we count on you to come through for us today and rush a contribution?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kK3RC2H_fi-3ywXTR9z0YNjeujLd4Y0Anygrj1hV2_8=/gb5oJx5ugQrA2p6pkUhSiqk0bFDBnWV4r1trF0OYWSQ=?refcode=X_102720_VBM_A)
